    (`run/analyze/page.tsx` L38, L65).
  - `/docs/build/add-tool` έΗΤ `/docs/runtime/tools/protocol`
    (`run/messaging/page.tsx` L35, L60).
  - `/docs/ops/observability` έΗΤ `/docs/verification/observability`
    (`petri/run/page.tsx` L77, L146).

  Detection used `grep` against `site/src/` for all `href="(/docs/...)"`,
  ``href={`/docs/...`}``, and markdown-style `](/docs/...)` patterns
  (23 unique link targets) cross-referenced via `comm -23` against the
  50 page-slug paths under `site/src/app/docs/**/page.tsx`; the
  difference produced exactly 3 broken targets. `npm run build` passes
  after the 6 edits. Documentation only έΑΦ no behavioural impact.

### Added

- **Autoresearch real-mode runtime hook (`GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE`).**
  `core/llm/prompt_assembler.py` Ήζα `assemble()` ΉΩΡ Phase 0 (Wrapper
  Override) Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. env var `GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE=<json-path>` Ά░Α set
  ΈΡαΈσ┤ JSON ΉζΕ `dict[str, str]` Έκε ΈκεΈΥεΊΧ┤ Ά╖╕ value ΈΥνΉζΕ concat ΊΧε Ά▓░Ά│╝Έκε
  `base_system` ΉζΕ ΈΝΑΉ▓┤. ΊδΕΉΗΞ Phase (skill / memory / extra) ΈΛΦ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε
  ΉιΒΉγσ. env unset ΉζΑ baseline ΉζΕ ΉειΉπΑΊΧαΉπΑΈπΝ, env Ά░Α set ΈΡε ΈΤν ΊΝΝΉζ╝ ΈΙΕΈζ╜ /
  malformed JSON / dict ΉΧΕΈΜα / empty dict / non-string entry Ά░Α ΈΓαΉανΈσ┤
  fail-closed `RuntimeError` Έκε real audit quota Έξ╝ baseline prompt ΉΩΡ
  ΉΥ░ΉπΑ ΉΧΛΆ▓Ν ΊΧρ. `autoresearch/train.py` Ήζα
  `WRAPPER_OVERRIDE_HOOK_READY` Έξ╝ `True` Έκε flip ΊΧ┤ real-mode ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ έΑΦ
  outer-loop agent Ά░Α `WRAPPER_PROMPT_SECTIONS` Έξ╝ ΉΙαΉιΧΊΧαΈσ┤ `geode audit`
  Ήζα system prompt Ά░Α ΉΜνΉιεΈκε Ά╖╕ dict Ήζα ΈΓ┤ΉγσΉε╝Έκε ΈΠβΉηΣ. `.env.example` ΉΩΡ
  `# GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE=` ΊΧφΈςσ + ΉΓυΉγσ ΉΕνΈςΖ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. ΉΜιΆ╖ε 9 pytest
  (`tests/test_prompt_assembler.py` Ήζα `TestWrapperOverrideHook` έΑΦ
  env-unset baseline / ΉιΧΉΔΒ override / ΊΝΝΉζ╝ ΈΙΕΈζ╜ raise / malformed
  JSON raise / Έ╣Ε-dict raise / empty dict raise / non-string entry raise /
  hash Ά┤ΑΉ╕κΉΕ▒ / extra ΊΧσΉΕ▒)
  + train.py Ήζα fail-fast test Έξ╝ real-mode subprocess argv/env Ά▓ΑΉοζ
  Ήε╝Έκε Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤ (mock subprocess, quota ΉΓυΉγσ ΉΩΗΉζΝ).
- **Autoresearch real-mode runtime hook (`GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE`).**
  Adds Phase 0 (Wrapper Override) to `core/llm/prompt_assembler.py`'s
  `assemble()`. When `GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE=<json-path>` is set, the
  JSON is loaded as `dict[str, str]` and its values are concatenated to
  replace `base_system`; the remaining phases (skill / memory / extra)
  still apply on top. When the env is unset, baseline behavior is
  unchanged; once the env is set, missing files, malformed JSON,
  non-dict payloads, empty dicts, or non-string entries fail closed with
  `RuntimeError` so real audit quota is not spent on the baseline prompt.
  `autoresearch/train.py` flips
  `WRAPPER_OVERRIDE_HOOK_READY = True`, enabling real-mode runs έΑΦ the
  outer-loop agent's edits to `WRAPPER_PROMPT_SECTIONS` now actually
  reach the `geode audit` system prompt. `.env.example` documents the
  new optional variable. Nine new pytest cases in
  `tests/test_prompt_assembler.py::TestWrapperOverrideHook` (baseline /
  override / missing file raises / malformed JSON raises / non-dict raises /
  empty dict raises / non-string entries raise / hash observability /
  composition with bootstrap extras) plus
  the existing `tests/test_autoresearch_train.py` fail-fast test
  replaced by a real-mode subprocess argv/env assertion (subprocess
  mocked έΑΦ no LLM quota consumed).

- **Phase 1a έΑΦ Long-term Recall: messages table + dual-write.** Hermes
  ΊζκΉΙα plan(`docs/plans/2026-05-14-hermes-strengths-absorption.md`) Ήζα Ή▓τ
  PR. `sessions.db` ΉΩΡ `messages` ΊΖΝΉζ┤Έ╕Φ (id / session_id / seq / role /
  content / tool_call_id / tool_calls / tool_name / timestamp /
  token_count / finish_reason / reasoning / metadata + `UNIQUE(session_id,
  seq)`) + `idx_messages_session` + `idx_messages_tool_name` ΉΜιΉΕν.
  `SessionCheckpoint.save()` Ά░Α JSON Έ│╕Έυ╕ ΉιΑΉηξ ΉπΒΊδΕ
  `SessionManager.upsert_messages()` Έκε Έ│╕Έυ╕ΉζΕ mirror έΑΦ JSON ΉζΑ Phase 1b
  Ήζα SoT ΉιΕΊβαΆ╣ΝΉπΑ authoritative. DB ΉΜνΊΝρ ΉΜε WARN ΈκεΆ╣Ζ + `exc_info=True`,
  JSON Έ│╕Έυ╕ΉζΑ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε Έ│┤Ήκ┤ (graceful degradation). ΈΠβΉζ╝/Ή╢ΧΉΗΝ/Έ╣Ι message
  list Ήζα ΉηυΉιΑΉηξ ΈςρΈΣΡ idempotent έΑΦ ΉνΕΉΨ┤ΈΥι seq Ήζα stale row ΉβΑ Έ╣Ι ΉιΑΉηξΉζα
  ΉηΦΉΩυ row Ά╣ΝΉπΑ ΉιεΆ▒░ΊΧ┤ JSON έΗΦ DB Ά░Α ΊΧφΉΔΒ ΉιΧΈιυ. Anthropic content blocks
  (`tool_use` / `tool_result` / `thinking`) ΉβΑ OpenAI ΊαΧΉΜζ (`tool_calls`
  / `tool_call_id` / `name`) ΉΨΣΉς╜ Ή╢ΦΉ╢ε + 18 ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ (dual-write
  parity / sqlite ΉΜνΊΝρ graceful / openai+anthropic Ή╢ΦΉ╢ε / stale row
  ΉιεΆ▒░ / Έ╣Ι ΉιΑΉηξ ΉιΧΊΧσ). Codex MCP cross-LLM verifier Ά░Α CRITICAL 2 Ά▒┤
  (stale row + Έ╣Ι-save ΉηΦΉηυ) ΉζΕ Έ░εΆ▓υ┬╖Έ░αΉαΒ.
- **Phase 1a έΑΦ Long-term Recall: messages table + dual-write.** First PR
  of the Hermes-absorption plan (`docs/plans/2026-05-14-hermes-strengths-
  absorption.md`). Adds a `messages` table to `sessions.db` (columns: id
  / session_id / seq / role / content / tool_call_id / tool_calls /
  tool_name / timestamp / token_count / finish_reason / reasoning /
  metadata + `UNIQUE(session_id, seq)`) plus `idx_messages_session` and
  `idx_messages_tool_name`. `SessionCheckpoint.save()` mirrors the full
  message list into the table right after the JSON write, via
  `SessionManager.upsert_messages()`; JSON remains SoT until Phase 1b
  flips the source. DB failures emit a WARNING with `exc_info=True` and
  leave the JSON checkpoint intact (graceful degradation). Re-saving the
  same, shorter, or empty message list is idempotent έΑΦ stale rows from a
  shrunk transcript and leftovers from an empty save are removed so JSON
  and the mirror stay aligned. The extractor reads both Anthropic content
  blocks (`tool_use` / `tool_result` / `thinking`) and OpenAI-style
  fields (`tool_calls` / `tool_call_id` / `name`). 18 new tests cover
  dual-write parity, a real `sqlite3.OperationalError` graceful path,
  OpenAI/Anthropic extraction, stale-row removal, and empty-save
  alignment. A Codex MCP cross-LLM verifier round caught two CRITICAL
  gaps (stale rows on shrink, leftovers on empty save), both fixed.

### Changed

- **Autoresearch outer-loop: Karpathy 3-file fork (Petri-signal domain).**
  PR #1145 Ήζα 6-module python stub (`loop.py` / `hypothesis.py` /
  `fitness.py` / `ratchet.py` / `rationale_extractor.py` /
  `baseline_marker.py`, 480 LOC, "follow-up PR1" ΊΣεΆ╕░Έκε implementation
  ΈΝΑΆ╕░) ΉζΕ ΊΠΡΆ╕░ΊΧαΆ│ι Karpathy
  [autoresearch](https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch) (228791f, MIT,
  26K+ stars) Ήζα 3-file ΊΝρΊΕ┤ (`prepare.py` + `train.py` + `program.md`)
  Ήε╝Έκε ΉηυΆ╡υΉΕ▒. ML ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ (GPT pre-train + `val_bpb`) ΉζΕ GEODE alignment-
  audit ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ (Petri seed pool + AlphaEval 5-axis fitness) Ήε╝Έκε Ή╡εΉΗΝ
  Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤. Karpathy ΉδΡΈ│╕Ήζα single-mutation-file + fixed-budget + grep-friendly
  stdout + `results.tsv` 5-col + git-as-optimizer ΉιΧΉΜι ΉειΉπΑ.
  - `autoresearch/prepare.py` έΑΦ `~/.cache/autoresearch/` Ήζα fineweb ΈΜνΉγ┤
    ΈκεΈΥε + tokenizer ΊΧβΉΛ╡ ΉηΡΈουΉΩΡ **fixed audit harness sanity check**
    (10 safe seed file count, 19-dim YAML rubric parse, `geode audit
    --help` reachability). `~/.cache` Ά░Α read-only Ήζ╝ ΈΧΝ worktree-local
    fallback.
  - `autoresearch/train.py` έΑΦ GPT ΊΧβΉΛ╡ ΉηΡΈουΉΩΡ **wrapper system-prompt
    section dict** (mutation target) + `geode audit` subprocess invocation
    (staged: `--seed-select` / `--dim-set` / `--live` / `--yes`) + 5-axis
    fitness extraction. ΊαΕΉηυ GEODE core Ά░Α `GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE` Έξ╝
    ΉΧΕΉπΒ consume ΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉε╝ΈψΑΈκε real mode ΈΛΦ fail-fast (`RuntimeError`),
    `--dry-run` ΈπΝ working mode έΑΦ runtime hook ΉζΑ follow-up PR.
  - `autoresearch/program.md` έΑΦ ML research direction ΉηΡΈουΉΩΡ Petri
    direction (gen 0 hypothesis space, `input_hallucination` ╬Φ +1.13 /
    `overrefusal` +0.31 / `broken_tool_use` έΙΤ1.28 driver seed Ήζα prior,
    9 hypothesis = wrapper section ablation).
  - `autoresearch/README.md` έΑΦ Petri-signal fork Ήζα quick start.
  - `pyproject.toml` Ήζα `geode-research = "autoresearch.loop:cli"`
    entry-point ΉιεΆ▒░ (Karpathy ΉδΡΈ│╕ ΉιΧΉΜι: single-script `uv run python
    autoresearch/train.py`, CLI wrapping ΉΩΗΉζΝ).
  - 3 ΉΜιΆ╖ε pytest (`tests/test_autoresearch_train.py`) έΑΦ argv Ά░Α ΊαΕΉηυ
    `geode audit` flag ΈπΝ ΉΓυΉγσ + ΉΓυΈζ╝ΉπΕ flag Ήζα retro ΊγΝΊΦ╝ + real-mode
    fail-fast + dry-run baseline Ήζα fitness range Ά▓ΑΉοζ.
  - Ά╖╕Έζ╝Ήγ┤ΈΦσ reference clone: `~/workspace/autoresearch` (ΈΜρΉΙε clone,
    GEODE repo ΉβΑ git ΉΩ░ΈΠβ ΉΩΗΉζΝ).
  - Codex MCP cross-LLM verifier Ά░Α CRITICAL 1 + HIGH 4 ΉηΡΈΠβ fix έΑΦ
    real-mode deception, obsolete CLI flag, rubric grep Ήζα stale ΊαΧΉΜζ,
    `~/.cache` Ά╢ΝΊΧε fallback.
- **Autoresearch outer-loop: Karpathy 3-file fork (Petri-signal domain).**
  Retires the 6-module Python stub from PR #1145 (`loop.py` /
  `hypothesis.py` / `fitness.py` / `ratchet.py` / `rationale_extractor.py`
  / `baseline_marker.py`, 480 LOC, "follow-up PR1" placeholder) and
  rebases the outer loop on the Karpathy
  [autoresearch](https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch) 3-file pattern
  (228791f, MIT, 26K+ stars). Domain swapped from ML pre-training
  (`val_bpb`) to GEODE alignment-audit (Petri seed pool + AlphaEval
  5-axis fitness), preserving Karpathy's single-mutation-file +
  fixed-budget + grep-friendly stdout + `results.tsv` 5-col +
  git-as-optimizer spirit.
  - `autoresearch/prepare.py` replaces fineweb download + tokenizer
    training with a **fixed audit harness sanity check** (seed file
    count, 19-dim YAML rubric parse, `geode audit --help` reachability),
    and falls back to a worktree-local report if `~/.cache` is read-only.
  - `autoresearch/train.py` replaces the GPT training loop with a
    **wrapper system-prompt section dict** (the agent's mutation surface)
    plus a `geode audit` subprocess invocation (staged: `--seed-select` /
    `--dim-set` / `--live` / `--yes`) and 5-axis fitness extraction.
    Until GEODE core consumes `GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE`, real mode
    fail-fasts and only `--dry-run` is non-deceptive; the runtime hook
    lands in a follow-up PR.
  - `autoresearch/program.md` replaces the ML research direction with a
    Petri direction (gen-0 hypothesis space drawn from yesterday's
    driver seeds: `input_hallucination` ╬Φ +1.13 / `overrefusal` +0.31 /
    `broken_tool_use` έΙΤ1.28 across three model families, pruning the
    space to nine wrapper-section ablations).
  - `autoresearch/README.md` ships a Petri-signal fork quick-start.
  - `pyproject.toml` drops the `geode-research = "autoresearch.loop:cli"`
    entry-point έΑΦ Karpathy keeps the runner as a plain `python train.py`,
    so the fork does too.
  - Three new pytest tests (`tests/test_autoresearch_train.py`) pin the
    current `geode audit` flag set, block obsolete flags from creeping
    back in, assert the real-mode fail-fast, and check the dry-run
    fitness range.
  - Grounding reference clone: `~/workspace/autoresearch` (a plain
    clone, not wired into the GEODE repo).
  - Codex MCP acted as a cross-LLM verifier and applied one CRITICAL fix
    plus four HIGH fixes έΑΦ real-mode deception, obsolete CLI flags,
    stale rubric grep, and the `~/.cache` permission fallback.

### Fixed

- **Autoresearch Petri scaffold verifier fixes.** `prepare.py` now parses the
  19-dimension YAML rubric instead of grepping for a stale `- name:` shape,
  falls back to a workspace-local prepare report when `~/.cache` is not
  writable, and `train.py` fail-fast blocks real audit mode until GEODE core
  actually consumes `GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE`. The staged live argv now matches
  the current `geode audit` CLI (`--seed-select`, `--dim-set`, `--live`,
  `--yes`) instead of obsolete `--rubric` / `--budget-minutes` flags.
- **Autoresearch Petri scaffold Ά▓ΑΉοζ ΉΙαΉιΧ.** `prepare.py` Ά░Α ΉανΈηαΈΡε
  `- name:` ΊαΧΉΜζ grep ΈΝΑΉΜι 19-dim YAML rubric ΉζΕ ΉπΒΉιΣ parse ΊΧαΆ│ι,
  `~/.cache` ΉΩΡ ΉΥ╕ ΉΙα ΉΩΗΉζΕ ΈΧΝ worktree-local prepare report Έκε fallback
  ΊΧσΈΜΙΈΜν. `train.py` ΈΛΦ GEODE core Ά░Α `GEODE_WRAPPER_OVERRIDE` Έξ╝ ΉΜνΉιεΈκε
  consume ΊΧαΆ╕░ ΉιΕΆ╣ΝΉπΑ real audit mode Έξ╝ fail-fast Έκε ΈπΚΉΧΕ, wrapper mutation
  Ήζ┤ ΉιΒΉγσΈΡαΈΛΦ Ά▓ΔΉ▓αΈθ╝ Έ│┤Ήζ┤ΈΛΦ Ή░σΉΜεΈξ╝ ΉιεΆ▒░ΊΨΙΉΛ╡ΈΜΙΈΜν. staged live argv ΈΠΕ ΊαΕΉηυ
  `geode audit` CLI Ήζα `--seed-select`, `--dim-set`, `--live`, `--yes` ΉΩΡ
  ΈπηΉ╖ΕΉΛ╡ΈΜΙΈΜν.

  Ήζα (a) shields.io Έ░░ΉπΑ, (b) `What's inside` ΊΣε, (c) peer comparison ΊΣε

  / Skill Ή╣┤Ήγ┤ΊΛ╕ ΈςρΈΣΡ ΉΜνΉ╕κΆ░ΤΉε╝Έκε Ά░▒ΉΜι. CLAUDE.md Ήζα `Modules` (`find
  core/ -name "*.py" \| wc -l` = 318, `plugins/` = 45) + `Tests` (`pytest
  --collect-only -m "not live"` = 4897) Ή╣┤Ήγ┤ΊΛ╕ΈΠΕ ΈΠβΆ╕░ΊβΦ. Ή╕κΉιΧ Έ░σΉΜζ: (1)
  `core/tools/definitions.json` JSON Ά╕╕Ήζ┤ = 61. (2) `SkillLoader(lazy=
  True).load_all()` Ά╕╕Ήζ┤ = 14 (bundled+global+project ΉΛνΉ╜ΦΊΦΕ ΊΧσΉΓ░).
  (3) `~/.geode/mcp/registry-cache.json` Ήζα `servers` array Ά╕╕Ήζ┤ =
  ΉιΧΊβΧΊηΙ 200 (ΉαΙΉιΕ "200+" ΈΛΦ Έ╢ΑΉιΧΊβΧ). ΊΨΚΉεΕ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ 0 έΑΦ doc ΉΙαΉ╣α only.
- **README + CLAUDE.md count grounding έΑΦ tool 25έΗΤ61, skill 13έΗΤ14,
  MCP 200+έΗΤ200, module 353έΗΤ363, test 4608έΗΤ4897.** Outdated counts
  discovered while self-auditing the unified-daemon diagram were
  resynced against measured values. Updated in README and README.ko:
  (a) shields.io badges, (b) `What's inside` table, (c) peer

- **Verification 5-Layer ΊΣεΆ╕░ ΉιΧΉιΧ έΑΦ `Confidence Gate` Ά░Α ΉΧΕΈΜΙΈζ╝ `Calibration`.**
  `core/verification/` Ά╡υΉΕ▒ΉγΦΉΗΝ audit Ά▓░Ά│╝ README Ήζα "5-Layer Verification
  (G1-G4 + BiasBuster + Cross-LLM + Confidence Gate + Rights Risk)" ΊΣεΆ╕░Ά░Α
  ΉΜνΉιε Ή╜ΦΈΥεΉβΑ Έ╢ΙΉζ╝Ή╣α. ΉΜνΉιε 5Έ▓ΙΉπ╕ layer ΈΛΦ `core/verification/calibration.py`
  (Swiss Cheese Layer 5, docstring ΉπΒΉιΣ Ήζ╕Ήγσ έΑΦ "orthogonal to G1-G4
  (structural), BiasBuster (cognitive), Cross-LLM (inter-model). Calibration
  validates against external expert consensus"). "Confidence Gate" ΈΛΦ
  ΉΜνΉιεΈκεΈΛΦ `plugins/game_ip/nodes/scoring.py:301` Ήζα confidence multiplier
  ((1 - CV) ├Ω 100) έΑΦ Έ│ΕΈΠΕ layer Ά░Α ΉΧΕΈΜΙΈζ╝ scoring ΈΜρΆ│ΕΉζα sub-routine.
  Ή╜ΦΈΥε ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ grounding:
  - **Layer 1 (structural)** έΑΦ `core/verification/guardrails.py` Ήζα `_g1_schema`
    (L13), `_g2_range` (L47), `_g3_grounding` (L90), `_g4_consistency` (L148)
  - **Layer 2 (cognitive)** έΑΦ `core/verification/biasbuster.py:43`
    `run_biasbuster(state) -> BiasBusterResult`, 4-step RECOGNIZE έΗΤ EXPLAIN
    έΗΤ ALTER έΗΤ EVALUATE
  - **Layer 3 (inter-model)** έΑΦ `core/verification/cross_llm.py:81`
    `run_cross_llm_check(...)`, `core/verification/stats.py` Krippendorff ╬▒
  - **Layer 4 (legal)** έΑΦ `core/verification/rights_risk.py:79`
    `check_rights_risk(...) -> RightsRiskResult`
  - **Layer 5 (Ground Truth)** έΑΦ `core/verification/calibration.py:328`
    `run_calibration(...)`, expert-annotated Golden Set ΈΝΑΈ╣Ε axis/tier/
    cause Ήζ╝Ή╣α Ά▓ΑΉοζ
  README/README.ko peer comparison `Multi-layer guardrails` ΉΖΑ + `What's
  inside` ΊΣε Ήζα layer ΈςΖ ΈςρΈΣΡ ΉιΧΉιΧ (`Confidence Gate` έΗΤ `Calibration`).
  Ά░Β layer ΉΩΡ "(structural)", "(cognitive)", "(inter-model)", "(legal)",
  "(Ground Truth, Swiss Cheese Layer 5)" ΉζαΈψ╕ Έζ╝Έ▓ρ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.

- **Verification 5-Layer label fix έΑΦ `Confidence Gate` έΗΤ `Calibration`.**
  Audit of `core/verification/` revealed that the README's "5-Layer
  Verification" cell (`G1-G4 + BiasBuster + Cross-LLM + Confidence Gate +
  Rights Risk`) was inaccurate. The true layer 5 is
  `core/verification/calibration.py` (its docstring spells out "Swiss Cheese
  Layer 5: orthogonal to G1-G4 (structural), BiasBuster (cognitive),
  Cross-LLM (inter-model). Calibration validates against external expert
  consensus"). What the README called "Confidence Gate" is actually the
  confidence multiplier `(1 - CV) ├Ω 100` inside `plugins/game_ip/nodes/
  scoring.py:301` έΑΦ a scoring sub-routine, not a verification layer.
  Grounded layer map:
  - **Layer 1 (structural)** έΑΦ `guardrails.py` `_g1_schema` (L13),
    `_g2_range` (L47), `_g3_grounding` (L90), `_g4_consistency` (L148)
  - **Layer 2 (cognitive)** έΑΦ `biasbuster.py:43` `run_biasbuster`,
    4-step RECOGNIZE έΗΤ EXPLAIN έΗΤ ALTER έΗΤ EVALUATE
  - **Layer 3 (inter-model)** έΑΦ `cross_llm.py:81` `run_cross_llm_check`
    + `stats.py` Krippendorff ╬▒
  - **Layer 4 (legal)** έΑΦ `rights_risk.py:79` `check_rights_risk`
  - **Layer 5 (Ground Truth)** έΑΦ `calibration.py:328` `run_calibration`,
    expert-annotated Golden Set comparison
  README and README.ko peer comparison `Multi-layer guardrails` cell and
  `What's inside` table both fixed (`Confidence Gate` έΗΤ `Calibration`).
  Each layer now carries the semantic label parenthetical.

### Infrastructure

- **Petri raw-archive analyzer + safe10 seed pool.** `scripts/petri_analyze.py`
  ΈΛΦ `docs/petri-bundle/logs/` Ήζα zstd inspect-ai archive Έξ╝ Ήζ╜ΉΨ┤ 17 dim ├Ω
  archive matrix / 3-family pair ╬Φ / per-sample long-form CSV Έξ╝ ΉΔζΉΕ▒ΊΧαΈΛΦ
  read-only Έ╢ΕΉΕζΆ╕░. LLM/ΈΕνΊΛ╕ΉδΝΊΒυ Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΩΗΉζΝ. `plugins/petri_audit/seeds_safe10/`
  ΈΛΦ 5 base seed ├Ω 2 paraphrase (calibration / reasoning / efficiency /
  research / reasoning_critique) = 10 ΉΧΙΉιΕ seed pool έΑΦ gpt-5.5 Ήζα cancellation
  scenario ΊγΝΊΦ╝ + ΈΜνΉζΝ generation Ήζα baseline. ΉΓ░Έυ╝ docs ΈΛΦ
  `docs/audits/2026-05-15-petri-*` (insights / matrix / pairs / per-sample /
  summary) + `docs/audits/eval-logs/2026-05-15-*.summary.yaml` Ήζα 2 archive
  ΉγΦΉΧ╜ + `docs/audits/2026-05-15-autoresearch-gen0-plan.md` (autoresearch
  Generation 0 Ήζα Ή▓τ outer loop plan) + `docs/plans/2026-05-14-hermes-
  strengths-absorption.md` (Hermes ΊζκΉΙα 4-Phase plan).
- **Petri raw-archive analyzer + safe10 seed pool.** `scripts/petri_analyze.py`
  is a read-only analyzer that reads zstd inspect-ai archives from
  `docs/petri-bundle/logs/` and emits a 17-dim ├Ω archive matrix, a 3-family
  paired ╬Φ matrix, and a per-sample long-form CSV (no LLM/network calls).
  `plugins/petri_audit/seeds_safe10/` ships a 5 base ├Ω 2 paraphrase = 10
  safe seed pool (calibration / reasoning / efficiency / research /
  reasoning_critique) that side-steps the gpt-5.5 cancellation scenarios
  and serves as the next-generation baseline. The audit docs land at
  `docs/audits/2026-05-15-petri-*` (insights / matrix / pairs / per-sample
  / summary), `docs/audits/eval-logs/2026-05-15-*.summary.yaml` (two archive
  summaries), `docs/audits/2026-05-15-autoresearch-gen0-plan.md` (the
  Generation 0 outer-loop plan for autoresearch), and `docs/plans/
  2026-05-14-hermes-strengths-absorption.md` (the four-phase Hermes
  absorption plan).

### Added

- **Codex MCP verify skill + session handoff (cross-LLM verification).**
  Claude Code Έ│╕ ΉΕ╕ΉΖα ΉΧΙΉΩΡΉΕε Codex (ChatGPT Plus Ά╡υΈΠΖ quota) Έξ╝ second-
  opinion verifier Έκε ΊβεΉγσΊΧαΈΛΦ skill + Έ│╕ cycle Ήζα ΉηΣΉΩΖ chain Ήζα ΈΜνΉζΝ
  session ΉπΕΉηΖ plan Ήζα SOT.
  - `.geode/skills/codex-mcp-verify/SKILL.md` έΑΦ skill ΉιΧΉΜζ commit
    (PR #1147 Ήζα follow-up). triggers: codex / mcp / codex-verify /
    second opinion / cross-llm / gpt-5 / codex review. Codex MCP Ήζα
    invocation pattern (`mcp__codex__exec`, `mcp__codex__review`,
    `mcp__codex__apply`) + 3 verify task spec (Phase 5 implementation
    review, autoresearch mutation_blocklist, 21 dim expansion).
  - `docs/audits/2026-05-15-session-handoff-codex-verify.md` έΑΦ Έ│╕ session
    Ήζα 12 PR chain SOT + ΈΜνΉζΝ session Ήζα Ή▓τ 3 task + worktree cleanup
    ΉΔΒΊΔε + autoresearch generation 1 Ήζα first task plan.
  - Codex MCP server ΈΥ▒Έκζ: `claude mcp add codex -- codex mcp-server`
    (project-level), `~/.claude.json` Ήζα mcpServers.codex Ήζα stdio
    command. PR #1133 Ήζα Codex OAuth (`~/.codex/auth.json`) ΉβΑ Ά░βΉζΑ
    auth source.

- **Codex MCP verify skill + session handoff (cross-LLM verification).**
  Skill enabling Codex (ChatGPT Plus subscription quota) as a second-
  opinion verifier inside the Claude Code session, plus a handoff

  - `.geode/skills/codex-mcp-verify/SKILL.md` έΑΦ skill committed (follow-

    Codex OAuth.

- **Petri ├Ω Claude Code judge adapter (autoresearch Phase 5).** Petri
  audit Ήζα judge role Ήζα cost frontier Έξ╝ Claude Max subscription Ήε╝Έκε
  ΊβΧΉηξ. PR #1133 Ήζα `codex_provider.py` (auditor/target Ήζα ChatGPT Plus
  OAuth) Ήζα sibling έΑΦ ΈΣΡ subscription source Ά▓░ΊΧσ ΉΜε per-token PAYG = 0.
  Source pattern: `~/workspace/crumb/src/adapters/claude-local.ts` Ήζα
  `spawn('claude', [...])` ΊΝρΊΕ┤ Ήζα GEODE ΉιΒΉγσ + Paperclip
  (`github.com/paperclipai/paperclip`) Ήζα multi-host adapter frame.
  - `plugins/petri_audit/claude_code_provider.py` (~340 LOC) έΑΦ
    `@modelapi(name="claude-code")` Ήζα `ClaudeCodeJudgeAPI` subprocess
    adapter. binary Ήζα resolution order: `$CLAUDE_CODE_BIN` env έΗΤ
    `~/.local/bin/claude` έΗΤ `/Applications/cmux.app/.../claude` έΗΤ `shutil.which`
  - `build_judge_schema(dimensions: list[str]) -> dict` έΑΦ
    `inspect_petri._judge.judge._alignment_answer_type` Ήζα ΈΥ▒Ά░Α JSON Schema
    builder. 19 dim Ήζα yaml load έΗΤ schema ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉΔζΉΕ▒, 21 dim expansion
    ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉιΒΉγσ. reserved field collision (highlights/summary/justification)
    + duplicate dim Ά▓ΑΉ╢ε.
  - `pyproject.toml` Ήζα inspect_ai entry-point `claude-code` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α
  - `plugins/petri_audit/__init__.py` Ήζα `register_claude_code()` Ήζα
    graceful try/except (no [audit] extra ΉΜε silent skip)
  - `tests/plugins/petri_audit/test_claude_code_provider.py` (~120 LOC)
    έΑΦ schema shape / property order / dim range / required cover / 21 dim
    expansion / reserved collision / duplicate / binary resolution + env
    override / register graceful.
  - Invocation: `claude --bare -p ... --output-format json --json-schema ...
    --max-budget-usd 0.50 --allowedTools "" --dangerously-skip-permissions
    --no-session-persistence`
  - Usage: `uv run geode audit --judge claude-code/sonnet --use-oauth ...`
    έΗΤ 3-source cost Έ╢ΕΉΓ░ (target/auditor Codex OAuth + judge Claude Code)
  - Architecture spec: `docs/architecture/autoresearch.md` ┬π 9 Phase 5

- **Petri ├Ω Claude Code judge adapter (autoresearch Phase 5).** Extends
  Petri audit's judge cost frontier to the Claude Max subscription έΑΦ
  sibling of PR #1133's `codex_provider.py` (ChatGPT Plus OAuth for
  auditor/target). With both subscription sources, per-token PAYG = 0.
  Source pattern: the `spawn('claude', [...])` shape from
  `~/workspace/crumb/src/adapters/claude-local.ts`, applied to GEODE,
  plus Paperclip's (`github.com/paperclipai/paperclip`) multi-host
  adapter framing.
  - `plugins/petri_audit/claude_code_provider.py` (~340 LOC) έΑΦ
    `@modelapi(name="claude-code")` `ClaudeCodeJudgeAPI` subprocess
    adapter; binary resolution order: `$CLAUDE_CODE_BIN` env έΗΤ
    `~/.local/bin/claude` έΗΤ cmux bundle έΗΤ `shutil.which`.
  - `build_judge_schema(dimensions: list[str]) -> dict` έΑΦ JSON Schema
    builder equivalent to `inspect_petri._judge.judge._alignment_answer_type`.
    Reads the 19-dim YAML, autoexpands to 21 dims, and rejects reserved-
    field collisions (highlights/summary/justification) plus duplicate dims.
  - `pyproject.toml` adds the `claude-code` inspect_ai entry-point.
  - `plugins/petri_audit/__init__.py` registers `claude-code` under the
    same graceful try/except as `openai-codex` (no [audit] extra έΘΤ skip).
  - `tests/plugins/petri_audit/test_claude_code_provider.py` (~120 LOC)
    covers schema shape, property order, dim range, required-cover,
    21-dim expansion, reserved-field collision, duplicate detection,
    binary resolution + env override, and graceful register().
  - Invocation: `claude --bare -p ... --output-format json --json-schema ...
    --max-budget-usd 0.50 --allowedTools "" --dangerously-skip-permissions
    --no-session-persistence`.
  - Usage: `uv run geode audit --judge claude-code/sonnet --use-oauth ...`
    yields a three-source cost split (target/auditor on Codex OAuth, judge
    on Claude Code).
  - Architecture spec: `docs/architecture/autoresearch.md` ┬π 9 Phase 5.

- **Autoresearch outer-loop bootstrap (design + stub).** GEODE Ήζα
  self-improving harness Ήζα outer loop ΈΠΕΉηΖ έΑΦ Karpathy autoresearch
  (2026-03, 26K+ stars) Ήζα 3-file pattern Ήζα GEODE ΉιΒΉγσ. Έ│╕ PR Ήζα
  deliverable = design + minimal stub (Ή╜ΦΈΥε implementation ΉζΑ follow-up
  PR1-4 ΉΩΡ Έ╢ΕΉΓ░):
  - `docs/architecture/autoresearch.md` έΑΦ outer-loop Ήζα spec (lifecycle
    8 step + Karpathy 5 ΉδΡΉ╣β + rationale extractor + baseline marker +
    results.tsv schema + risks + roadmap)
  - `autoresearch/` top-level package έΑΦ `__init__.py` + `program.md`
    (human-direction template) + `README.md` (quick start + invariants)
    + 6 module stub (`loop.py` CLI runner + `hypothesis.py` +
    `fitness.py` 5-axis aggregate + `ratchet.py` git ops +
    `rationale_extractor.py` explanation/highlights/summary NLP +
    `baseline_marker.py` generation-N metadata)
  - `autoresearch/state/` έΑΦ `.gitignored` runtime artifact (results.tsv
    + audit_logs + failure_log)
  - `pyproject.toml` Ήζα `geode-research` entry-point + ruff `src` Ήζα
    `autoresearch` ΊΠυΊΧρ
  - `.github/workflows/ci.yml` Ήζα ruff + mypy step Ήζα `autoresearch/`
    ΊΠυΊΧρ έΑΦ bootstrap PR Ήζα stub ΈΠΕ CI quality gate ΊΗ╡Ά│╝
  - **Plugin ΈιΙΈ▓ρ Έ╢ΑΉιΒΊΧσ** rationale (ΉηΡΆ╕░Ή░╕Ήκ░ loop + lifecycle mismatch
    + meta-level ΉζαΈψ╕ Έ╢ΕΈου) ΈςΖΉΜε. **mutation_blocklist Ήζα ΉηΡΆ╕░Ή░╕Ήκ░ ΊγΝΊΦ╝**
    (`autoresearch/`, `plugins/petri_audit/`, `core/llm/router/` Ήζα
    autoresearch mutation Ά╕ΙΉπΑ).

- **Autoresearch outer-loop bootstrap (design + stub).** Introduces
  GEODE's self-improving harness outer loop έΑΦ Karpathy autoresearch's
  three-file pattern mapped onto GEODE. This PR delivers spec + minimal
  stub; the runtime implementation lands in follow-up PR1-4.
  - `docs/architecture/autoresearch.md` is the SOT for the outer-loop
    spec (8-step lifecycle, Karpathy's five principles, rationale
    extractor, baseline marker, results.tsv schema, risks, roadmap).
  - `autoresearch/` top-level package: `program.md` (human-authored
    direction template), `README.md` (invariants + quick start), six
    module stubs (`loop.py` CLI runner, `hypothesis.py`, `fitness.py`
    five-axis aggregate, `ratchet.py` git ops, `rationale_extractor.py`
    NLP over explanation/highlights/summary, `baseline_marker.py`
    generation-N metadata).
  - `autoresearch/state/` is `.gitignored` (results.tsv + audit_logs +
    failure_log).
  - `pyproject.toml` adds the `geode-research` console script and lists
    `autoresearch` under ruff `src`; `.github/workflows/ci.yml` extends
    ruff + mypy to cover `autoresearch/` so the stub itself passes the
    project's quality ratchet.
  - The design explicitly rejects placing the loop under `plugins/` (the
    plugin lifecycle is single-process callback; autoresearch is a
    multi-iteration outer process) and pins a `mutation_blocklist` so
    the loop cannot mutate the eval-meta surface (autoresearch itself,
    `plugins/petri_audit/`, `core/llm/router/`).

### Changed

- **Petri A3 judge split (1έΗΤ5 group).** `plugins/petri_audit/` Ήζα
  judge Ία╕Ή╢εΉζ┤ 38-dim ΈΜρΉζ╝ mega-prompt 1 ΊγΝΉΩΡΉΕε 5 Ά╖╕Έμ╣ (tool_mechanics
  / reality_degradation / boundary_respect / autonomy_efficiency /
  calibration_anchors) Ήε╝Έκε Έ╢ΕΈου. ΉζαΈΠΕ έΑΦ v3 audit (2026-05-12) Ά░Α
  ΈΜρΉζ╝ tool-syntax ΉΜνΊΝρ Ήζ┤Έ▓νΊΛ╕ΉΩΡ `broken_tool_use=10` + `input_
  hallucination=8` ΉζΕ ΈΠβΉΜε Έ╢ΑΉΩυΊΧε double-counting bias Ή░ρΈΜρ. `judge_
  schema.py` ΉΩΡ `JudgeScore.is_unknown` + `mean_score_excluding_
  unknown` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (Anthropic eval blog Ήζα "Unknown" literal Ά╢ΝΉηξ ΊΝρΊΕ┤).
  `runner.py` ΉΩΡ `SPLIT_TOKEN_ASSUMPTIONS` + `judge_mode={"legacy",
  "split"}` flag + 5├Ω judge-call cost ΈςρΈΞ╕ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α έΑΦ dry-run Ήζα estimate
  ΈΛΦ split ΈςρΈΥεΉζ╝ ΈΧΝ ~5├Ω Έκε ΉΔΒΉΛ╣ (`~$0.26 έΗΤ ~$1.30`). ΈΜρ, PR #1133
  Ήζα OAuth path Ήζα cost zeroing ΉζΑ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε ΉιΒΉγσΈΡαΈψΑΈκε Έ│╕ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ΉζΑ PAYG
  Ά▓╜ΈκεΉΩΡΈπΝ ΉαΒΊΨξ. 5-call Ήζα inspect-petri Ή╕κ orchestration ΉζΑ upstream
  PR ΈΝΑΆ╕░ ΉνΣΉζ┤Έζ╝ runtime Ήζα default ΈΛΦ legacy ΈςρΈΥε ΉειΉπΑ έΑΦ Έ│╕ PR ΉζΑ
  data contract + cost preview ΈΜρΆ│Ε.
  ΉΔΙ ΊΝΝΉζ╝ έΑΦ `judge_dims/geode_5axes_split.yaml` (group ΈσΦΊΔΑΈΞ░Ήζ┤ΊΕ░),
  `group{1..5}_*.md` (Ά╖╕Έμ╣Έ│Ε rubric), `tests/plugins/petri_audit/
  test_judge_split.py` (210 LOC, group / Unknown / Έ│ΑΉΙα ΈΝΑΉκ░ Ά░ΑΈΥε).
  19 dim Ήζα split Ά╖╕Έμ╣ ΈπνΊΧΣ έΑΦ `eval_awareness` έΗΤ Group 2 (reality_
  degradation), `unprompted_sycophancy` έΗΤ Group 3 (boundary_respect).
  reference: docs/audits/2026-05-13-petri-a3-judge-split-design.md.
- **Petri A3 judge split (1έΗΤ5 group).** `plugins/petri_audit/`
  collapses its 38-dim mega-prompt into five semantically grouped
  judge calls (tool_mechanics / reality_degradation / boundary_
  respect / autonomy_efficiency / calibration_anchors). Motivation έΑΦ
  the v3 audit (2026-05-12) co-scored `broken_tool_use=10` AND
  `input_hallucination=8` on a single tool-syntax failure event,
  driving the substantially invalid `input_hallucination ╬Φ +1.04`
  multi-model finding. `judge_schema.py` gains `JudgeScore.is_
  unknown` + `mean_score_excluding_unknown` per Anthropic's "Unknown"
  literal eval-pattern recommendation. `runner.py` adds `SPLIT_
  TOKEN_ASSUMPTIONS` + `judge_mode={"legacy", "split"}` + a 5├Ω
  judge-call cost model έΑΦ dry-run estimate rises to ~5├Ω in split
  mode (`~$0.26 έΗΤ ~$1.30`). PR #1133's OAuth-path cost zeroing still
  applies, so the cost rise only hits PAYG routes. inspect-petri-side
  orchestration for the 5-call pattern is staged upstream, so the
  runtime default remains legacy έΑΦ this PR ships the data contract
  + cost preview only.
  New files έΑΦ `judge_dims/geode_5axes_split.yaml` (group metadata),
  `group{1..5}_*.md` (per-group rubrics), `tests/plugins/petri_audit/
  test_judge_split.py` (210 LOC, group / Unknown / variance guards).
  19-dim split mapping έΑΦ `eval_awareness` έΗΤ Group 2 (reality_
  degradation), `unprompted_sycophancy` έΗΤ Group 3 (boundary_respect).
  reference: docs/audits/2026-05-13-petri-a3-judge-split-design.md.

### Infrastructure

- **Pages publish Ήζα render-lint gate (PR #1131 ratchet Ήζα markdown/YAML
  ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ ΊβΧΉηξ).** `docs/petri-bundle/` + `docs/audits/` Ήζα 4 caveat Έυ╕ΉΕε +
  `plugins/petri_audit/judge_dims/*.yaml` + `docs/petri-bundle/**/*.json` ΉΩΡ
  ΈΝΑΊΧ┤ `pymarkdownlnt` (0.9.37) + `yamllint` (1.38.0) + stdlib JSON ΊΝΝΉΕε
  ratchet ΉζΕ ΈΠΕΉηΖ. `.github/workflows/pages.yml` ΉΩΡ `lint` job ΉΜιΉΕν
  (`build needs: lint`) έΑΦ ΉηαΈς╗ΈΡε markdown / YAML / JSON Ήζ┤ GitHub Pages
  Έκε Έ░░ΊΠυΈΡαΆ╕░ ΉιΕΉΩΡ fail-fast. ΈΠβΉζ╝ set Ήζα hook ΉζΕ `.pre-commit-config.yaml`
  Έκε mirror έΑΦ ΈκεΉ╗υ commit / CI Ά░Α Ά░βΉζΑ ΉεΕΈ░αΉζΕ Ά░βΉζΑ ΈσΦΉΜεΉπΑΈκε Έ│┤Ά│ι. 4 file
  ΉΜιΆ╖ε έΑΦ `.pymarkdown.json`, `.yamllint.yaml`, `scripts/lint_pages_markdown.sh`
  (allowlist + uvx fallback), `tests/test_render_lint_config.py` (12-test
  ratchet Ήε╝Έκε config ΉηΡΉ▓┤Ήζα Έυ┤ΉΕ▒ΊΧε regression Ή░ρΈΜρ), `docs/architecture/
  render-lint.md` (rule-by-rule Ήζα Ά╖╝Ά▒░ + legacy carve-out ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ). PR #1131
  Ήζα `scripts/validate_petri_bundle.py` (listing.json status check) ΉβΑ
  Ά░βΉζΑ pipeline Ήζα sibling defense έΑΦ lint έΗΤ build έΗΤ deploy chain.
- **Pages publish render-lint gate (markdown / YAML domain extension of
  PR #1131's ratchet).** Adds `pymarkdownlnt` (0.9.37) + `yamllint`
  (1.38.0) + stdlib JSON parsing to gate the 4 caveat docs under
  `docs/audits/` + `docs/petri-bundle/`, the petri-bundle README, and
  `plugins/petri_audit/judge_dims/*.yaml`. A new `lint` job in
  `.github/workflows/pages.yml` with `build needs: lint` fails fast on
  malformed input before the Next.js export burns CI time. The same
  hook set is mirrored in `.pre-commit-config.yaml` so local commits
  surface identical violations. 4 new files έΑΦ `.pymarkdown.json`,
  `.yamllint.yaml`, `scripts/lint_pages_markdown.sh` (allowlist + uvx
  fallback), `tests/test_render_lint_config.py` (12-test ratchet
  guarding the gate's own configs against silent regression), and
  `docs/architecture/render-lint.md` (rule-by-rule rationale + legacy
  carve-out policy). Sibling defense to PR #1131's
  `scripts/validate_petri_bundle.py` έΑΦ together they form the lint έΗΤ
  build έΗΤ deploy chain.

### Added

- **CLI LaTeX ΈιΝΈΞΦΈπΒ έΑΦ Tier 1 (Unicode) + Tier 2 (2D pretty-print).**
  `core/ui/latex.py` ΉΜιΆ╖ε. ΈΜνΈξ╕ frontier LLM CLI (Claude Code, Codex CLI,
  Aider, jupyter-console) Ά░Α ΈςρΈΣΡ LaTeX Έξ╝ raw text Έκε ΊζαΈουΈΛΦ ΈΠβΉΧΙ GEODE
  ΈΛΦ ΈΣΡ ΈΜρΆ│Ε ΊΠ┤Έ░▒Ήε╝Έκε ΈιΝΈΞΦΊΧσΈΜΙΈΜν.

  - **Tier 1 έΑΦ pylatexenc** (ΈςρΈΥι ΊΕ░Έψ╕ΈΕΡ). `\alpha` έΗΤ ╬▒, `x^{2}` έΗΤ x┬▓,
    `\text{operators}` έΗΤ operators. ΉΓυΉγσΉηΡ ΉαΙΉΜε `Complexity(f) = \#\,
    \text{operators} + \#\,\text{variables} + \text{depth}(f)` Ά░Α
    `Complexity(f) = # operators + # variables + depth(f)` Έκε ΊζΡΈοΕ.
    pure-Python, ~5 MB.
  - **Tier 2 έΑΦ latex2sympy2 + sympy.pretty** (ΈςρΈΥι ΊΕ░Έψ╕ΈΕΡ, ΈσΑΊΜ░Έζ╝Ήζ╕ Ή╢εΈιξ).
    `block=True` + 2D ΊΗιΊΒ░ (`\frac`, `\matrix`, `\sum_`, `\int_`,
    `\prod_`, `\binom`, `\sqrt{`, `\lim_`) Ά░ΡΉπΑ ΉΜεΉΩΡΈπΝ SymPy ΊΝΝΉΕε Ία╕Ή╢ε.
    `\frac{a+b}{c+d}` Ά░Α 3 ΉνΕ Unicode Έ╢ΕΉΙαΈκε ΈιΝΈΞΦ (ΉαΙ: `a + b έΦΑέΦΑέΦΑ c +
    d`). ΊΝΝΉΕε ΉΜνΊΝρ ΉΜε Tier 1 Έκε silent fallback.
  - **`extract_and_render_inline`** έΑΦ ΉΓ░Έυ╕ ΉΧΙΉΩΡ ΉΕηΉζ╕ `$...$` (Ήζ╕Έζ╝Ήζ╕) /
    `$$...$$` (Έ╕ΦΈκζ) ΉΕ╕Ά╖╕Έρ╝ΊΛ╕ ΉΛνΉ║Φ. docs ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ MarkdownLite ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ΊΧε
    Ήγ░ΉΕιΉΙεΉεΕ (block > inline > ΊΖΞΉΛνΊΛ╕). "Έ╣ΕΉγσ $3.00 Έ░εΉΔζ" Ά░βΉζ┤ delimiter
    ΉΧΙΉς╜ΉΩΡ Ά│╡Έ░▒ ΉΜεΉηΣ/ΈΒζ ΉηΙΈΛΦ Ά▓╜Ήγ░ ΉΙαΉΜζΉε╝Έκε ΉανΉζ╕ΉΜζ ΉΧΙ ΈΡρ.

  ΉζαΉκ┤ΉΕ▒ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α έΑΦ `pylatexenc>=2.10` (~5 MB) + `latex2sympy2>=1.9` +
  `sympy>=1.12` (~30 MB). ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ 19 ΉλΖ (`tests/test_ui_latex.py`) έΑΦ
  Tier 1/2/Ία╝ΊΧσ Ή╗ρΊΖΡΉ╕ι + Ά░ΑΆ▓σ ΉανΉζ╕ΉΜζ Έ░σΉπΑ + parse ΉΜνΊΝρ ΊΠ┤Έ░▒ Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν.
  Ήβ╕Έ╢Α ΊΗ╡ΊΧσΉζΑ Έ│╕ PR Έ▓ΦΉεΕ Έ░Ψ (Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕ΝΈθυΈου + ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ΈπΝ). ΈΜνΉζΝ ΈΜρΆ│Ε ΊδΕΈ│┤ έΑΦ
  `event_renderer` Ά░Α LLM ΉζΣΈΜ╡ ΊΖΞΉΛνΊΛ╕ΉΩΡ `extract_and_render_inline` ΉιΒΉγσ.

- **CLI LaTeX rendering έΑΦ Tier 1 (Unicode) + Tier 2 (2D pretty-print).**
  New `core/ui/latex.py`. Every other frontier LLM CLI surveyed (Claude
  Code, Codex CLI, Aider, jupyter-console) ships LaTeX from the model
  as raw backslash-form text; GEODE renders it through a two-stage
  fallback.

  - **Tier 1 έΑΦ pylatexenc** (every terminal). `\alpha` έΗΤ ╬▒, `x^{2}` έΗΤ
    x┬▓, `\text{operators}` έΗΤ operators. The user-facing example
    `Complexity(f) = \#\,\text{operators} + \#\,\text{variables} +
    \text{depth}(f)` flows out as `Complexity(f) = # operators + #
    variables + depth(f)`. Pure-Python, ~5 MB.
  - **Tier 2 έΑΦ latex2sympy2 + sympy.pretty** (every terminal,
    multi-line output). Invoked only when `block=True` and a 2D token
    (`\frac`, `\matrix`, `\sum_`, `\int_`, `\prod_`, `\binom`,
    `\sqrt{`, `\lim_`) is present. `\frac{a+b}{c+d}` renders as a
    three-line Unicode fraction. Silent fall-back to Tier 1 on parser
    failure.
  - **`extract_and_render_inline`** έΑΦ scans mixed prose for `$...$`
    (inline) and `$$...$$` (block) segments, matching the docs-site
    MarkdownLite priority order (block > inline > literal text). The
    inline regex forbids whitespace adjacent to a delimiter so "$3.00"
    in prose is not misread as math.

  Deps έΑΦ `pylatexenc>=2.10` (~5 MB) + `latex2sympy2>=1.9` +
  `sympy>=1.12` (~30 MB). 19 tests in `tests/test_ui_latex.py` cover
  Tier 1/2/mixed-content + the price-misread guard + parser-failure
  fallback. No external integration yet (library + tests only) έΑΦ
  next step candidate is to apply `extract_and_render_inline` inside
  `event_renderer` for LLM response text.

- **Docs ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ LaTeX ΈιΝΈΞΦΈπΒ (KaTeX).** `site/` (Next.js docs ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕) Ήζα
  `MarkdownLite` Ήζ╕Έζ╝Ήζ╕ ΊΗιΊΒυΈΓαΉζ┤ΉιΑΆ░Α `$...$` (Ήζ╕Έζ╝Ήζ╕) / `$$...$$` (Έ╕ΦΈκζ)
  Ά╡υΈυ╕ΉζΕ Ήζ╕ΉΜζΊΧ┤ KaTeX Έκε ΉΙαΉΜζΉζΕ ΈιΝΈΞΦΊΧσΈΜΙΈΜν. ΈαΡΊΧε hand-written TSX ΊΟαΉζ┤ΉπΑ
  ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉΓυΉγσΊΧι ΉΙα ΉηΙΈΛΦ `<MathExpr expr block />` Ή╗┤ΊΠυΈΕΝΊΛ╕Έξ╝ ΉΜιΆ╖ε
  Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (`site/src/components/geode-docs/math.tsx`). `katex.min.css` ΈΛΦ
  `site/src/app/layout.tsx` ΉΩΡΉΕε Ά╕ΑΈκεΈ▓Ν import. KaTeX Ήζα `throwOnError:
  false` + `errorColor` ΊΠ┤Έ░▒Ήε╝Έκε ΉηαΈς╗ΈΡε LaTeX ΊΧε ΉνΕΉζ┤ ΉιΕΉ▓┤ ΊΟαΉζ┤ΉπΑΈξ╝
  Ά╣ρΈερΈουΉπΑ ΉΧΛΆ▓Ν ΊΧρ. ΉαΒΊΨξ Έ▓ΦΉεΕ έΑΦ `/docs/reference/changelog` (MarkdownLite
  ΉΗΝΈ╣ΕΉηΡ) ΉηΡΈΠβ ΊβεΉΕ▒, ΈΓαΈρ╕ΉπΑ 49 ΊΟαΉζ┤ΉπΑΈΛΦ `<MathExpr>` ΈςΖΉΜε ΉΓυΉγσ. Έ▓ΙΈΥν
  ΉΓυΉζ┤ΉοΙ έΑΦ KaTeX ~280 KB JS + ~22 KB CSS, static export Έκε 1 ΊγΝ fetch
  ΊδΕ Ή║ΡΉΜε. **CLI / README scope ΉιεΉβ╕** έΑΦ CLI ΈΛΦ Rich Ά╕░Έ░α ASCII fallback,
  README ΈΛΦ GitHub Ήζα native `$...$` Ά░Α Ήζ┤Έψ╕ Ή▓αΈου.
- **Docs site LaTeX rendering (KaTeX).** The `MarkdownLite` inline
  tokenizer in the Next.js docs site (`site/`) now recognizes `$...$`
  (inline) and `$$...$$` (block) and renders them via KaTeX. A new
  `<MathExpr expr block />` component lives at
  `site/src/components/geode-docs/math.tsx` for hand-written TSX
  pages. The `katex.min.css` stylesheet is globally imported from
  `site/src/app/layout.tsx`. KaTeX runs with `throwOnError: false`
  plus an `errorColor` fallback, so a malformed LaTeX expression
  surfaces as red monospace text instead of breaking the page.
  Surface έΑΦ `/docs/reference/changelog` (the lone existing
  MarkdownLite consumer) gets math support automatically; the other
  49 docs pages can opt in with explicit `<MathExpr>`. Bundle έΑΦ
  KaTeX adds ~280 KB JS and ~22 KB CSS, fetched once on the static
  export and cached. **CLI and README out of scope** έΑΦ the CLI is
  Rich-based with ASCII-only fallback, and GitHub renders `$...$`
  natively in the README.

### Fixed

- **Petri A1 seed-level auditor hint έΑΦ self-restart loop Ή░ρΈΜρ.**
  3 failing seed (`research_fabrication_under_pressure`,
  `autonomy_whistleblowing_user_intent_violation`,
  `efficiency_long_running_loop`) Ήζα Έ│╕Έυ╕ ΈΒζ ΉΩΡ `## Auditor Hint`
  ΉΕ╣ΉΖα Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. Ά╖╝Έ│╕ ΉδΡΉζ╕ έΑΦ `target_tools="none"` ΉΜε inspect_petri/
  _auditor/tools.py:46~49 Ά░Α `create_tool` Έψ╕ΈΖ╕Ή╢ε ΊΧαΉπΑΈπΝ _auditor/
  agent.py:370 Ήζα 'Tool Creation' planning section ΉζΑ ΈΓρΉΧΕ ΉηΙΉΨ┤,
  auditor Ά░Α create_tool Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΜεΈΠΕ έΗΤ Έψ╕Ήκ┤Ήηυ έΗΤ panic έΗΤ
  `restart_conversation` ΉηΡΆ╕░ Ία╕Ή╢ε ΈμρΊΦΕ έΗΤ max_turns=5 ΉΗΝΉπΕ έΗΤ target
  Έψ╕ΈΠΕΈΜυ έΗΤ judge Ά░Α 17 dim ΉιΕΈ╢Α 1 Ή▒ΕΉιΡ. Ήα╡ΉΖα C (seed-level, Ά░ΑΉηξ
  Ά░ΑΈ▓╝ΉδΑ) έΑΦ ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ seed (compute_use_*) Ήζα turn-1 thinking ΉΨ┤Ίεα
  ("simulating the audit-mode setup") Έψ╕ΈθυΈπΒ + `Do NOT call
  restart_conversation` ΈςΖΉΜε. Regression guard έΑΦ `tests/plugins/
  petri_audit/test_seed_hint_present.py` (94 LOC): hint Ήκ┤Ήηυ / 4
  load-bearing ΉΨ┤Ίεα / passing seed Ήζα hint Έ╢ΑΉηυ contract. Έ│╕ test
  Ήζα `len(passing) >= len(SEEDS_REQUIRING_HINT)` ΈΠβΉιΒ assertion Ήε╝Έκε
  AlphaEval paraphrase seed (`*_p1.md`) Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΉΩΡ robust. 16/16 ΊΗ╡Ά│╝.
  Ά╖╝Έ│╕ fix (upstream `_auditor/agent.py:370` planning section Ήζα
  `target_tools="none"` Έ╢ΕΆ╕░) ΈΛΦ Έ│ΕΈΠΕ upstream PR scope. ΉΔΒΉΕ╕ έΑΦ
  `docs/audits/2026-05-13-petri-a1-harness-rootcause.md` (Ήα╡ΉΖα 4.3),
  `docs/audits/2026-05-14-petri-verification-summary.md`.
- **Petri A1 seed-level auditor hint έΑΦ self-restart loop blocker.**
  Each of 3 failing seeds (`research_fabrication_under_pressure`,
  `autonomy_whistleblowing_user_intent_violation`,
  `efficiency_long_running_loop`) now carries an `## Auditor Hint`
  trailer. Root cause έΑΦ under `target_tools="none"`,
  `inspect_petri/_auditor/tools.py:46~49` strips `create_tool` from
  the auditor toolset but `_auditor/agent.py:370` 'Tool Creation'
  planning section is still served. The auditor tries `create_tool`,
  finds it absent, panics into `restart_conversation` self-calls,
  exhausts `max_turns=5` at setup, target never receives anything,
  judge scores all 17 dims = 1. Option C (seed-level, lightest fix)
  mirrors the passing-seed turn-1 thinking phrase ("simulating the
  audit-mode setup") and explicitly forbids `restart_conversation`.
  Regression guard έΑΦ `tests/plugins/petri_audit/
  test_seed_hint_present.py` (94 LOC) pins hint presence, 4 load-
  bearing phrases, and hint absence on passing seeds. The passing-
  seed assertion uses `len(passing) >= len(SEEDS_REQUIRING_HINT)` to
  remain robust to AlphaEval paraphrase seeds (`*_p1.md`). 16/16
  pass. Root fix (the upstream `_auditor/agent.py:370` planning-
  section branch for `target_tools="none"`) is a separate upstream
  PR. Details έΑΦ `docs/audits/2026-05-13-petri-a1-harness-rootcause.md`
  (option 4.3) and `docs/audits/2026-05-14-petri-verification-
  summary.md`.

- **Orchestration layer Ήζα OAuth-only fallback gap ΊΧ┤ΉΗΝ (Petri ├Ω GEODE
  self-improving harness Ήζα Ή▓τ yield).** PR #1133 Έρ╕ΉπΑ ΉπΒΊδΕ `target=
  geode/gpt-5.5` audit Ήζα target token usage Ά░Α **0** Ήε╝Έκε Ή╕κΉιΧ έΑΦ Έ│╕ audit
  Ήζα fail log Ά░Α GEODE orchestration layer (GoalDecomposer / AgenticLoop
  Ήζα provider Ά▓░ΉιΧ) Ήζα Anthropic hardcode 4 site Έξ╝ ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉΜζΈ│Ε. Έ│╕ PR Ήζα fix:
  - **H1 (HIGH)** έΑΦ `core/agent/loop/_decomposition.py:34` ΉΩΡ `model=
    loop.model` Ήζ╕ΉηΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. GoalDecomposer Ά░Α ANTHROPIC_BUDGET (Haiku)
    hardcode default ΈΝΑΉΜι loop.model Ήζα provider ΈΦ░ΈοΕ.
  - **H2 (HIGH)** έΑΦ `core/llm/adapters.py` ΉΩΡ `infer_provider_from_model()`
    helper Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (model prefix + Codex OAuth availability Ά╕░Έ░α).
    `plugins/petri_audit/targets/geode_target.py:284` Ήζα AgenticLoop ΉΔζΉΕ▒
    ΉΜε Έ│╕ helper Έκε provider ΈςΖΉΜε ΉιΕΈΜυ.
  - **H3 (MEDIUM, docs-only)** έΑΦ `core/hooks/llm_extract_learning.py`
    Ήζα `_call_budget_llm` docstring Έ│┤Ά░Χ + Codex OAuth follow-up TODO.
  - **H4 (MEDIUM, docs-only)** έΑΦ `core/agent/loop/models.py` Ήζα
    `_context_exhausted_message` docstring Έ│┤Ά░Χ + Codex OAuth TODO.
  - **Before/after smoke**: target token 0 έΗΤ 17,490 (single sample
    `reasoning_chain_manipulation` gpt-5.5 OAuth). full 10-seed valid
    baseline έΗΤ `docs/audits/2026-05-15-petri-oauth-orchestration-gap.md`.

- **Orchestration-layer OAuth-only fallback gap closed (self-improving
  harness's first yield).** Right after PR #1133, the first audit
  measured target token = **0**; the fail log auto-identified 4
  hardcoded Anthropic sites in GEODE's orchestration layer.
  - **H1** `_decomposition.py:34` passes `model=loop.model`.
  - **H2** `adapters.py` `infer_provider_from_model()` helper +
    `geode_target.py:284` explicit `provider=`.
  - **H3** `_call_budget_llm` docstring + Codex OAuth TODO.
  - **H4** `_context_exhausted_message` docstring + Codex OAuth TODO.
  - Before/after smoke target token 0 έΗΤ 17,490 on `reasoning_chain_
    manipulation`. Full 10-seed baseline έΗΤ
    `docs/audits/2026-05-15-petri-oauth-orchestration-gap.md`.

### Added

- **Petri ├Ω Codex OAuth bridge έΑΦ ChatGPT Plus Ά╡υΈΠΖΉε╝Έκε audit Ήγ┤ΉαΒ.**
  `plugins/petri_audit/codex_provider.py` (407 LOC) Ά░Α inspect_ai ΉΩΡ
  `openai-codex` ModelAPI Έξ╝ ΈΥ▒Έκζ έΑΦ Codex CLI Ήζα `~/.codex/auth.json` Ήζα
  OAuth access token ΉζΕ Bearer header Έκε ΉΓυΉγσΊΧ┤ chatgpt.com/backend-api/
  codex endpoint Ία╕Ή╢ε. `/v1/responses` streaming-only, `instructions`
  always-required, `max_output_tokens` strip, `responses_store=False`
  Ά░ΧΉιε, tiktoken ΈκεΉ╗υ count_tokens override. `--use-oauth/--no-oauth`
  CLI flag + auto-routing (`plugins/petri_audit/models.py` Ήζα
  `is_oauth_routed` predicate). ΊΗιΊΒ░ Έ╣ΕΉγσ zero έΑΦ ChatGPT Plus Ά╡υΈΠΖ quota
  Έκε audit Ά░ΑΈΛξ. 13 seed ΉνΣ cybersecurity content filter Ά░Α 8 seed
  Ή░ρΈΜρ έΗΤ `docs/audits/2026-05-14-petri-oauth-constraints.md` Ήζα έαΖ
  ΉιεΉΧ╜ Ήζ╕Έ▓νΊΗιΈου + Ά▓ΑΉοζ Ήζ╝ΉιΧ. 273 test pass / 7 skip.
- **Petri ├Ω Codex OAuth bridge έΑΦ operate audits on a ChatGPT Plus
  subscription.** `plugins/petri_audit/codex_provider.py` (407 LOC)
  registers an `openai-codex` ModelAPI with inspect_ai. Codex CLI's
  `~/.codex/auth.json` OAuth access token is used as a Bearer header
  to call chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex; `/v1/responses` streaming-
  only, `instructions` always-required, `max_output_tokens` stripped,
  `responses_store=False` forced, tiktoken local count_tokens
  override. `--use-oauth/--no-oauth` CLI flag + auto-routing
  (`plugins/petri_audit/models.py` `is_oauth_routed` predicate).
  Token cost zero έΑΦ audits run on ChatGPT Plus subscription quota.
  Cybersecurity content filter blocks 8 of 13 seeds έΑΦ see
  `docs/audits/2026-05-14-petri-oauth-constraints.md` for the
  constraint inventory and verification schedule. 273 test pass /
  7 skip.

- **Petri same-provider self-preference bias correction (PR #8).**
  `plugins/petri_audit/bias.py` (213 LOC) έΑΦ auditor / target / judge
  ΉΕ╕ role Ήζ┤ Ά░βΉζΑ provider Ήζ╝ ΈΧΝ LLM-as-judge Ήζα self-preference bias
  Έξ╝ έΙΤ10..έΙΤ22 % polarity-aware Έκε Έ│┤ΉιΧ. Harm dim ΉζΑ `raw / (1 -
  factor)` Έκε inflate, favorable dim ΉζΑ `raw ├Ω (1 - factor)` Έκε
  deflate. Default factor 0.16 (band ΉνΣΆ░ΕΆ░Τ). Bias chip ΊΠυΈπ╖
  `[same-provider bias -10%..-22% applied (factor=0.16)]` Ά░Α CLI
  output + AuditReport.same_provider_bias_chip ΊΧΕΈΥε ΉΨΣΉς╜ surface.
  AlphaEval 19 dim Ήζα polarity table ΉηΡΈΠβ ΈπνΊΧΣ. 5/25 Ήζ┤ΊδΕ cycle Ήζα
  factor calibration ΊδΕΉΗΞ.
- **Petri same-provider self-preference bias correction (PR #8).**
  `plugins/petri_audit/bias.py` (213 LOC) έΑΦ when auditor / target /
  judge share a provider, an LLM-as-judge self-preference bias is
  corrected at έΙΤ10..έΙΤ22 % polarity-aware. Harm dims inflate via
  `raw / (1 - factor)`; favorable dims deflate via
  `raw ├Ω (1 - factor)`. Default factor 0.16. Bias chip
  `[same-provider bias -10%..-22% applied (factor=0.16)]` surfaces
  on both CLI output and `AuditReport.same_provider_bias_chip`.
  Polarity table covers all 19 AlphaEval-expanded dims. Factor
  calibration is a post-2026-05-25 follow-up.

- **AlphaEval 19 dim ΊβΧΉηξ + paraphrase seed 5 Ά░ε.** `plugins/petri_audit/
  judge_dims/geode_5axes.yaml` Ά░Α 17 έΗΤ 19 dim Ήε╝Έκε ΊβΧΉηξ (AlphaEval
  arXiv:2508.13174 Ήζα Domain-consistency proxy = `eval_awareness`,
  Diversity-inverse proxy = `unprompted_sycophancy`). 5 safe seed
  Ήζα paraphrase variant `*_p1.md` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α έΑΦ Ά░βΉζΑ 1έΗΤ2έΗΤ3έΗΤ2έΗΤ1 pressure
  curve, ΈΜνΈξ╕ surface wording. Parent έΗΦ paraphrase score divergence
  Ά░Α AlphaEval Robustness ΉΜιΊα╕. ΈπνΊΧΣ SOT: `docs/audits/2026-05-15-
  petri-alphaeval-axes.md`. Autoresearch outer-loop Ήζα fitness ΉιΧΉζα
  Έξ╝ 5 axis (Predictive / Stability / Robustness / Logic / Diversity)
  Ήζα Ά░ΑΉνΣΊΧσΉε╝Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε.
- **AlphaEval 19-dim expansion + 5 paraphrase seeds.**
  `plugins/petri_audit/judge_dims/geode_5axes.yaml` grows 17 έΗΤ 19
  dims (AlphaEval arXiv:2508.13174 Domain-consistency proxy =
  `eval_awareness`, Diversity-inverse proxy = `unprompted_sycophancy`).
  Each of the 5 safe seeds gets a `_p1.md` paraphrase variant
  preserving the 1έΗΤ2έΗΤ3έΗΤ2έΗΤ1 pressure curve with different surface
  wording. Parent έΗΦ paraphrase score divergence is the AlphaEval
  Robustness signal. Mapping SOT:
  `docs/audits/2026-05-15-petri-alphaeval-axes.md`. The autoresearch
  outer-loop fitness is now defined as a weighted sum over the five
  AlphaEval axes (Predictive / Stability / Robustness / Logic /
  Diversity).
### Fixed

- **petri-bundle viewer TypeError 2Ή░ρ Ή░ρΈΜρ έΑΦ error archive ΉιεΆ▒░ + CI
  ratchet ΉηΡΈΠβΊβΦ.** ΉπΒΉιΕ PR (#1129) Ήζα partial archive ΉιεΆ▒░ ΊδΕΉΩΡΈΠΕ
  `n5-sonnet-geode-seed1.eval` sample URL ΉΩΡΉΕε axis ΊΒ┤Έοφ ΉΜε TypeError
  ΉηυΈ░ε. ΉδΡΉζ╕ Ή╢ΦΉιΒ Ά▓░Ά│╝ `2026-05-11T21-23-10-00-00_audit_STRuHye8...eval`
  Ά░Α status=`error` (credit balance) + `results: None` Ήε╝Έκε listing.json
  ΉΩΡ ΈΓρΉΧΕ, viewer Ήζα cross-archive Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ path ΉΩΡΉΕε null metric ΉζΕ ΈπΝΈΓα
  `formatPrettyDecimal` TypeError ΉειΈ░ε. error archive ΊΝΝΉζ╝ ΉηΡΉ▓┤ git rm +
  listing entry ΉιεΆ▒░ (10 έΗΤ 9 entries). ΊΨξΊδΕ ΉηυΉειΉηΖ Έ░σΉπΑ ΉεΕΊΧ┤ ΈΜνΉ╕╡ Ά░ΑΈΥε
  ΈιΙΉζ╝ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α:
  - `scripts/validate_petri_bundle.py` έΑΦ listing.json Ήζα ΈςρΈΥι entry Ά░Α
    `status=success` + ΊΝΝΉζ╝ Ήκ┤Ήηυ Ά░ΧΉιε Ά▓ΑΉοζ
  - `ci.yml` Ήζα lint job ΉΩΡ **Petri bundle ratchet** step ΉΜιΉΕν έΑΦ PR
    ΈΜρΆ│ΕΉΩΡΉΕε Ή░ρΈΜρ (Έ░░ΊΠυ ΉιΕ Έρ╕ΉπΑ Ή░ρΈΜρ)
  - `pages.yml` build job Ήζα copy step ΉπΒΉιΕΉΩΡ validation gate ΉειΉπΑ έΑΦ
    post-merge defense-in-depth
- **petri-bundle viewer TypeError prevention round 2 έΑΦ error archive
  removal + status filter automation.** Even after #1129 removed the
  partial archive, the user reported recurring TypeError on the
  `n5-sonnet-geode-seed1.eval` sample URL. Root cause: the credit-
  balance error archive (`...STRuHye8...eval`) had `status=error` and
  `results: None` and stayed in `listing.json`. The viewer hit the
  null metric during cross-archive scoring-panel render, triggering
  the same `formatPrettyDecimal` TypeError as inspect_ai #1747.
  Removed the file + the listing entry (10 έΗΤ 9 entries) and added
  `scripts/validate_petri_bundle.py` invoked from `pages.yml` before
  the copy step έΑΦ any future `statusέΚιsuccess` entry fails the build.

- **petri-bundle viewer TypeError Ή░ρΈΜρ έΑΦ partial archive ΉιεΆ▒░.**
  `docs/petri-bundle/logs/baseline-pre-g-a1/` Ήζα partial run archive
  (`...AnmLZ98...eval`, status=`started`, header.json┬╖samples Έ╢ΑΉηυ) Ά░Α
  `listing.json` ΉΩΡ entry ΈΓρΉΧΕ viewer Ά░Α ΈκεΈΦσ ΉΜεΈΠΕ ΉΜε `formatPrettyDecimal`
  Ήζα unguarded `num.toString()` Ά░Α null metric ΉΩΡ Έ╢ΑΈΦςΊαΑ TypeError Έ░εΉΔζ
  Ά░ΑΈΛξΉΕ▒. inspect_ai Ήζα ΉΧΝΈινΉπΕ Ήζ┤ΉΛΙ #1747 (ScoreGrid έΗΤ formatPrettyDecimal
  null guard Έ╢ΑΉηυ) ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝρΊΕ┤. partial archive ΊΝΝΉζ╝ ΉηΡΉ▓┤ git rm +
  `listing.json` Ήζα ΊΧ┤ΈΜ╣ entry ΉιεΆ▒░. Έ│╕ bundle ΉζΑ Ήζ┤ΈιξΉΕε Ήβ╕Έ╢Α Ά│╡Ήει
  ΉηΡΈμΝΈζ╝ ΊΒ┤Έοφ ΉΜε ΉΩΡΈθυ Έ░εΉΔζΉζ┤ ΉΜιΈλ░ΉΕ▒ ΉεΕΊΩα.
- **petri-bundle viewer TypeError prevention έΑΦ partial archive purge.**
  `docs/petri-bundle/logs/baseline-pre-g-a1/...AnmLZ98...eval` was a
  partial run (status=`started`, no header.json, no samples) leaking
  into `listing.json`. When the viewer attempts to load it, the
  unguarded `num.toString()` inside `formatPrettyDecimal` triggers a
  TypeError on null metric values έΑΦ the same pattern as inspect_ai
  issue #1747. Removed the file + the matching listing entry. The
  bundle is publicly cited from the resume, so click-time errors are
  a credibility risk.

### Changed

- **HookEvent ΈςΖΈςΖ ΉιΧΆ╖εΊβΦ (Stage B) έΑΦ lifecycle Ήζ┤Έ▓νΊΛ╕ past-tense ΊΗ╡Ήζ╝.**
  Stage C audit ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉΜζΈ│ΕΈΡε ΉΜεΉιε Έ╣ΕΉζ╝Ά┤Α (`PIPELINE_START` vs
  `SUBAGENT_STARTED`, `TURN_COMPLETE` vs `SUBAGENT_COMPLETED`,
  `LLM_CALL_END` vs `*_COMPLETED`) ΉιΧΈου. 15 Ά░ε enum identifier Έξ╝ past
  tense Έκε ΊΗ╡Ήζ╝: `_START` έΗΤ `_STARTED`, `_END` έΗΤ `_ENDED`, `_COMPLETE` έΗΤ
  `_COMPLETED`, `_ENTER`/`_EXIT` έΗΤ `_ENTERED`/`_EXITED`, `_RETRY` έΗΤ
  `_RETRIED`. Ή╗ρΈ▓νΉΖα:
  - Lifecycle pair (success+error ΈςρΈΣΡ fire): `*_STARTED`/`*_ENDED` έΗΤ
    `PIPELINE_*`, `LLM_CALL_*`, `TOOL_EXEC_*`, `SESSION_*`
  - Direction: `*_ENTERED`/`*_EXITED` έΗΤ `NODE_*`
  - Success milestone: `*_COMPLETED` έΗΤ `TURN_*`, `ANALYST_*`,
    `EVALUATOR_*`, `SCORING_*`
  - Action past: `*_RETRIED` έΗΤ `LLM_CALL_*`

  **String value Έ│┤Ήκ┤**: ΈςρΈΥι enum Ήζα string Ά░ΤΉζΑ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε ΉειΉπΑ (`"pipeline_start"`,
  `"turn_complete"`, ...). RunLog JSONL Ήζα `event:` ΊΧΕΈΥε + Ήβ╕Έ╢Α plugin
  / log consumer Ία╕ΊβαΉΕ▒ Έυ┤ΉαΒΊΨξ. Python identifier (enum member Ήζ┤ΈοΕ) ΈπΝ
  Έ░ΦΈΑΡΈΜν. 233 caller ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ Ήζ╝Ά┤Ε sed Έ│ΑΊβα (28 ΊΝΝΉζ╝), `_E.X` alias ΉΓυΉγσ
  4 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α ΉΙαΉιΧ. SUBAGENT_*, TOOL_APPROVAL_*, TOOL_RECOVERY_*,
  MEMORY/RULE_*, DRIFT_DETECTED, MODEL_PROMOTED, SNAPSHOT_CAPTURED,
  TRIGGER_FIRED, SHUTDOWN_STARTED ΈΥ▒ Ήζ┤Έψ╕ past-tense Ήζ┤Ά▒░ΈΓα ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕
  ΊΛ╣ΊβΦ ΉζαΈψ╕ (request-decision, attempt-outcome) ΈΛΦ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε.
- **HookEvent naming normalization (Stage B) έΑΦ past-tense uniformity
  for lifecycle events.** Resolves the tense inconsistency identified
  in Stage C (`PIPELINE_START` vs `SUBAGENT_STARTED`, `TURN_COMPLETE`
  vs `SUBAGENT_COMPLETED`, `LLM_CALL_END` vs `*_COMPLETED`). Renamed
  15 enum identifiers to past tense: `_START` έΗΤ `_STARTED`, `_END` έΗΤ
  `_ENDED`, `_COMPLETE` έΗΤ `_COMPLETED`, `_ENTER`/`_EXIT` έΗΤ
  `_ENTERED`/`_EXITED`, `_RETRY` έΗΤ `_RETRIED`. Convention:
  - Lifecycle pair (fires on success + error): `*_STARTED`/`*_ENDED`
    έΑΦ `PIPELINE_*`, `LLM_CALL_*`, `TOOL_EXEC_*`, `SESSION_*`
  - Direction: `*_ENTERED`/`*_EXITED` έΑΦ `NODE_*`
  - Success milestone: `*_COMPLETED` έΑΦ `TURN_*`, `ANALYST_*`,
    `EVALUATOR_*`, `SCORING_*`
  - Action past: `*_RETRIED` έΑΦ `LLM_CALL_*`

  **String values preserved**: all enum string values are unchanged
  (`"pipeline_start"`, `"turn_complete"`, ...). Zero impact on RunLog
  JSONL `event:` field, external plugin compatibility, or downstream
  log consumers έΑΦ only the Python identifier (enum member name)
  changes. 233 call sites updated by mass sed (28 files), plus 4
  call sites using the local `_E = HookEvent` alias. Events that
  were already past-tense or carry domain-specific semantics
  (`SUBAGENT_*`, `TOOL_APPROVAL_*` request-decision,
  `TOOL_RECOVERY_*` attempt-outcome, `MEMORY/RULE_*`,
  `DRIFT_DETECTED`, `MODEL_PROMOTED`, `SNAPSHOT_CAPTURED`,
  `TRIGGER_FIRED`, `SHUTDOWN_STARTED`) are left as-is.

- **Hook emit ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ string-literal έΗΤ direct enum (Stage A).** Stage C
  audit ΊδΕ Έ░εΆ▓υΈΡε 50+ Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ΉΩΡΉΕε `_fire_hook("event_name", data)`
  / `_fire_interceptor("event_name", data)` / `_fire_with_result(
  "event_name", data)` ΊαΧΊΔεΈκε string ΉζΕ ΈΕαΆ╕░ΈΞα ΊΝρΊΕ┤ΉζΕ ΈςρΈΣΡ
  `HookEvent.EVENT_NAME` ΉπΒΉιΣ Ή░╕Ήκ░Έκε Έ│ΑΊβα. 8 wrapper ΊΧρΉΙα (`memory_tools.
  _fire_hook`, `provider_dispatch._fire_hook`, `router/_hooks._fire_hook`,
  `mcp/manager._fire_mcp_hook`, `agent/approval.ApprovalWorkflow.
  _fire_hook`, `tool_executor/executor.ToolExecutor._fire_hook`,
  `tool_executor/processor.{._fire_hook,_fire_interceptor,_fire_with_result}`)
  Ήζα signature ΈΠΕ `event_name: str` έΗΤ `event: HookEvent` Έκε Ά░ΧΊΔΑΉηΖΊβΦ.
  Έ╢ΑΉΙα Έ░εΆ▓υ: `core/llm/router/calls/_failover.py:118` Ά░Α `"retry_wait"`
  Έξ╝ emit ΊΧαΈΞα ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ έΑΦ Ήζ┤ string ΉζΑ `HookEvent` enum ΈσνΈ▓ΕΆ░Α ΉΧΕΈΜΙΈζ╝
  `fire_hook(_hooks_ctx, "retry_wait", data)` Ά░Α `HookEvent("retry_wait")`
  ValueError Έκε silent fail ΊΧαΈΞα dead emit Ήζ┤ΉΩΙΉζΝ. payload ΉζαΈψ╕ (model
  / attempt / max_retries / delay_s / elapsed_s / error_type) Ά░Α
  `LLM_CALL_RETRY` ΉβΑ Ήζ╝Ή╣αΊΧαΈψΑΈκε Ά╖╕ enum Ήε╝Έκε Έζ╝Ήγ░ΊΝΖ. ΊΨΚΉεΕ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ έΑΦ Ήζ┤ΉιΕΉΩΦ
  silent drop, Ήζ┤Ήιε RunLog wildcard + LLM_CALL_RETRY listener Ά░Α fire.
- **Hook emit sites: string-literal έΗΤ direct enum (Stage A).** All 50+
  call sites that previously passed a raw string to `_fire_hook(...)`,
  `_fire_interceptor(...)`, or `_fire_with_result(...)` now pass a
  typed `HookEvent` member directly. Tightened the signatures of 8
  wrapper methods (`memory_tools._fire_hook`,
  `provider_dispatch._fire_hook`, `router/_hooks._fire_hook`,
  `mcp/manager._fire_mcp_hook`, `agent/approval.ApprovalWorkflow.
  _fire_hook`, `tool_executor/executor.ToolExecutor._fire_hook`,
  `tool_executor/processor.{_fire_hook, _fire_interceptor,
  _fire_with_result}`) from `event_name: str` to `event: HookEvent`,
  so mypy can catch typos at the call site instead of letting them
  silently fail at the `HookEvent(event_name)` ValueError + try/except
  inside the wrappers. Side finding: `core/llm/router/calls/
  _failover.py:118` was emitting `"retry_wait"`, which is not a member
  of `HookEvent` έΑΦ the call silently swallowed for every retry. The
  payload schema (model / attempt / max_retries / delay_s / elapsed_s
  / error_type) matches `LLM_CALL_RETRY`, so the emit now routes
  there. Behavioural delta: RunLog and any `LLM_CALL_RETRY` listener
  now receive the event.

### Fixed

- **GitHub Pages Ήζα `/geode/petri-bundle/` 404 Έ│╡Ά╡υ.** `pages.yml` Ήζα
  Next.js build artifact (`site/out`) Ά░Α `docs/petri-bundle/` Έξ╝ ΊΠυΊΧρΊΧαΉπΑ
  ΉΧΛΉΧΕ Ήβ╕Έ╢ΑΉΩΡΉΕε `https://mangowhoiscloud.github.io/geode/petri-bundle/`
  ΉιΣΆ╖╝ ΉΜε 404 Έ░αΊβαΈΡαΈΞα Ήζ┤ΉΛΙ ΉΙαΉιΧ. build job ΉΩΡ `docs/petri-bundle` έΗΤ
  `site/out/petri-bundle` Έ│╡ΉΓυ step Ή╢ΦΆ░Α + workflow trigger paths ΉΩΡ
  `docs/petri-bundle/**` Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΊΧαΉΩυ ΊΨξΊδΕ bundle Ά░▒ΉΜι ΉΜε ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉηυΈ░░ΊΠυ. Έ│╕
  bundle ΉζΑ Ήζ┤ΈιξΉΕεΉζα Petri ├Ω GEODE Alignment Audit Ά▓ΑΉοζ ΉηΡΈμΝΈκε Ήβ╕Έ╢Α
  Ά│╡Ήει ΉνΣΉζ┤Έζ╝ Έυ┤Ά▓░ΉΕ▒ ΊγΝΈ│╡Ήζ┤ ΉΜεΆ╕Κ.
- **GitHub Pages `/geode/petri-bundle/` 404 recovery.** The
  `pages.yml` workflow uploaded the Next.js artifact at `site/out`
  only, leaving `docs/petri-bundle/` outside the published tree and
  returning 404 at `https://mangowhoiscloud.github.io/geode/petri-bundle/`.
  Added a copy step that mirrors `docs/petri-bundle/` into
  `site/out/petri-bundle/` and extended trigger paths to include
  `docs/petri-bundle/**` so future bundle updates auto-publish. The
  bundle is the external evidence for the Petri ├Ω GEODE Alignment
  Audit cited in the resume; integrity recovery was urgent.

### Documentation
