  hook-system.md` Ήζα maturity ΈςρΈΞ╕ ΊΣε + ΈΥ▒Έκζ ΊΧ╕ΈΥνΈθυ ΊΣεΈξ╝ ΉΜνΉιε Ή╜ΦΈΥε (`core/
  wiring/bootstrap.py`, `core/wiring/automation.py`, `core/hooks/plugins/
  notification_hook/hook.py`, `core/orchestration/{task_bridge,
  stuck_detection}.py`) Ήζα `hooks.register(...)` ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ΉβΑ 1:1 grep Ά▓ΑΉοζ.
  5 Ά╡░ΈΞ░ drift Έ░εΆ▓υ + ΉΙαΉιΧ έΑΦ (1) NotificationHook ΊΣεΆ╕░ priority `P75` έΗΤ
  ΉΜνΉιε `P200` (`notification_hook/hook.py:142`). (2) RunLog Ά░Α wildcard
  Έκε ΈΥ▒ΈκζΊΧαΈΛΦ Ήζ┤Έ▓νΊΛ╕ ΉΙα "ΉιΕΉ▓┤ 56Ά░ε" έΗΤ 58Ά░ε (ΊαΕΉηυ enum size ΉβΑ Ήζ╝Ή╣α).
  (3) TableLoggers "├Ω5" έΗΤ ΉΜνΉιε 19+5+1 = 20+ (audit_loggers 19 + automation
  loggers 5 + stuck_detector_* 3 + model_switch_logger ΈΥ▒). (4) hook-llm-
  lifecycle Ά░Α listen ΊΧεΈΜνΆ│ι ΊΣεΆ╕░ΈΡε `LLM_CALL_START/END/FAILED/RETRY` 4
  Ήζ┤Έ▓νΊΛ╕ έΗΤ ΉΜνΉιε `LLM_CALL_END` ΈπΝ (`bootstrap.py:358`). ΈΓαΈρ╕ΉπΑ 3 Ήζ┤Έ▓νΊΛ╕
  ΈΛΦ RunLog wildcard ΈπΝ Ή▓αΈου. (5) Headline "ΈΥ▒Έκζ ΊΧ╕ΈΥνΈθυ: 38+" έΗΤ ΉΜνΉιε
  table ΉΔΒ 60+. EN doc (`hook-system.en.md`) ΈΠΕ ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝρΊΕ┤ ΉιΒΉγσ. ΊΣε ΊΧαΈΜρ
  ΉΩΡ "Ά▓ΑΉοζ ΈσΦΈςρ (2026-05-13)" + ΊΧ╡ΉΜυ file:line reference 3 ΉνΕ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.
- **Hook system doc έΗΦ code consistency audit (Stage C).** Verified the
  maturity model and registered-handler tables in `docs/architecture/
  hook-system.md` against actual `hooks.register(...)` sites in `core/
  wiring/bootstrap.py`, `core/wiring/automation.py`, `core/hooks/plugins/
  notification_hook/hook.py`, and `core/orchestration/{task_bridge,
  stuck_detection}.py`. Found and fixed 5 drift points: (1)
  NotificationHook priority was documented as `P75` but is actually
  `P200` in code (`notification_hook/hook.py:142`). (2) RunLog wildcard
  registration documented as covering "all 56 events" έΑΦ corrected to 58
  matching the current enum. (3) TableLoggers row claimed "├Ω5" έΑΦ actual
  is 20+ across audit_loggers (19), automation loggers (5), and other
  P90 loggers. (4) hook-llm-lifecycle documented as listening to
  `LLM_CALL_START/END/FAILED/RETRY` έΑΦ actually only `LLM_CALL_END`
  (`bootstrap.py:358`); the other 3 are caught only by the RunLog
  wildcard. (5) Headline "Registered handlers: 38+" έΑΦ actual table
  count is 60+. EN doc (`hook-system.en.md`) updated with the same
  drift fixes. Added a "verification note (2026-05-13)" with three
  key file:line references at the bottom of the table.

- **README peer comparison: 5 ΈΜρΉδΡ collapsible + KO sync.** GitHub ΉΩΡΉΕε
  README Ά░Α ΊΧε ΊΟαΉζ┤ΉπΑΉΩΡ ΈΕΙΈυ┤ Ά╕╕ΉΨ┤ Έ│┤ΉαΑΈΞα Έυ╕Ήιε έΑΦ 25 axes 5 ΊΖΝΉζ┤Έ╕ΦΉζ┤ ΊΧεΆ║╝Έ▓ΙΉΩΡ
  ΈιΝΈΞΦΈΡαΉΨ┤ scroll Ήζ┤ Ά╕╕ΉΩΙΉζΝ έΑΦ ΉζΕ ΊΧ┤Ά▓░ΊΧαΆ╕░ ΉεΕΊΧ┤ AέΙ╝E 5 ΈΜρΉδΡΉζΕ Ά░ΒΉηΡ
  `<details>` Έ╕ΦΈκζΉε╝Έκε Ά░ΡΉΝΝΉζΝ (Ά╕░Έ│╕ closed). Ήζ╕ΊΛ╕Έκε ΊΧε ΉνΕ + Ά▓░Έκι ΊΧε ΉνΕΉζΑ
  ΊΧφΉΔΒ Έ│┤Ήζ┤Ά▓Ν ΉειΉπΑ. ΈαΡΊΧε `README.ko.md` Ά░Α Ήζ┤ΉιΕ PR Ήζα ΉαΒΈυ╕ sync ΉΩΡΉΕε
  ΈΙΕΈζ╜ΈΡαΉΨ┤ Ήαδ 7-axis ΊΣε + ΉΓυΉΜν ΉανΈξα ΉΖΑ (Bedrock/Vertex ΈΙΕΈζ╜, Azure/Ollama
  ΈΙΕΈζ╜) Ήζ┤ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε ΈΓρΉΧΕ ΉηΙΉΩΙΉζΝ έΑΦ ΉαΒΈυ╕ΊΝΡΆ│╝ ΈΠβΉζ╝ΊΧε 5 ΈΜρΉδΡ 25 Ή╢Χ Ά╡υΉκ░ +
  collapsible + Ή╢εΉ▓α footnote Ά╣ΝΉπΑ ΉβΕΉιΕ sync.
- **README peer comparison: collapsible 5 sections + KO sync.** Fixed
  page-length problem on GitHub where 25 axes across 5 tables rendered
  as one long scroll. Each of AέΑΥE now lives in its own `<details>` block
  (closed by default). Intro line + closing recommendation remain
  always visible. Also fixed a sync gap: `README.ko.md` retained the
  old 7-axis table (with the factually wrong "Anthropic only" / "OpenAI
  only" cells) because the previous PR only touched the English
  README. The Korean README now mirrors the English structure
  exactly έΑΦ 5 collapsible thematic sections, 25 grounded axes, 4-level
  marker, and source footnote.

- **README peer comparison: 7 έΗΤ 25 grounded axes across 5 thematic
  tables.** Ά╕░Ήκ┤ ΊΣεΆ░Α (a) ΉΓυΉΜν ΉανΈξα έΑΦ Claude Code ΈΛΦ "Anthropic only"
  ΊΣεΆ╕░ΉαΑΉε╝ΈΓα ΉΜνΉιεΈκεΈΛΦ Bedrock/Vertex Έζ╝Ήγ░ΊΝΖ ΉπΑΉδΡ, Codex CLI ΈΛΦ
  "OpenAI only" ΊΣεΆ╕░ΉαΑΉε╝ΈΓα ΉΜνΉιεΈκεΈΛΦ `model_providers` Έκε Azure /
  Bedrock / Ollama / any OpenAI-compatible Ά╣ΝΉπΑ έΑΦ ΉβΑ (b) "everyone έεΖ"
  ΉΖΑ Ά│╝ΈΜνΈκε Ή░ρΈ│ΕΊβΦ ΉΜιΊα╕Ά░Α ΉΧ╜ΊΨΙΉζΝ. Claude Code v2.1.72 ┬╖ Codex CLI
  v0.130 ┬╖ OpenClaw v2026.5.12 ┬╖ GEODE v0.95 Ήζα ΉΜνΉιε ΉΔΒΊΔεΈξ╝ 18 Ή╢ΧΉΦσ
  ΈουΉΕεΉ╣αΊΧε Ά▓░Ά│╝Έξ╝ 5 thematic ΊΖΝΉζ┤Έ╕Φ (Runtime posture / Channels & UX /
  LLM provider & cost / Persistence, memory & verification /
  Extensibility & observability) 25 Ή╢ΧΉε╝Έκε ΉηυΆ╡υΉΕ▒. 4-level marker
  (`έεΖέεΖ`/`έεΖ`/`έγιΎ╕Π`/`έζΝ`) Έκε nuance ΊΣεΊαΕ. GEODE Ή░ρΈ│ΕΊβΦ ΉΖΑΉΩΡ CHANGELOG
  version ref έΑΦ 200K token guard (v0.40), 5-layer context overflow
  (v0.39), 58-event hook system, 5-tier memory, 5-layer verification
  (G1-G4 + BiasBuster + Krippendorff ╬▒ έΚξ 0.67), Petri observability
  (v0.90). Ά▓░Έκι ΊΧε ΉνΕΈΠΕ 3 use case (Claude/Codex ┬╖ OpenClaw ┬╖ GEODE)
  ΈπνΊΧΣΉε╝Έκε ΊβΧΉηξ.
- **README peer comparison: 7 έΗΤ 25 grounded axes across 5 thematic
  tables.** The prior table contained (a) factual errors έΑΦ Claude Code
  listed as "Anthropic only" when Bedrock/Vertex routing has shipped,
  Codex CLI listed as "OpenAI only" when `model_providers` supports
  Azure / Bedrock / Ollama / any OpenAI-compatible έΑΦ and (b) too many
  "everyone έεΖ" cells, weakening differentiation. Researched the actual
  state of Claude Code v2.1.72, Codex CLI v0.130, OpenClaw v2026.5.12,
  and GEODE v0.95 across 18 axes each, then restructured into 5
  thematic tables (Runtime posture / Channels & UX / LLM provider &
  cost / Persistence, memory & verification / Extensibility &
  observability) totalling 25 axes. 4-level marker (`έεΖέεΖ`/`έεΖ`/`έγιΎ╕Π`/`έζΝ`)
  captures nuance. GEODE differentiator cells gain CHANGELOG version
  refs έΑΦ 200K token guard (v0.40), 5-layer context overflow (v0.39),
  58-event hook system, 5-tier memory, 5-layer verification (G1-G4 +
  BiasBuster + Krippendorff ╬▒ έΚξ 0.67), Petri observability (v0.90).
  Closing recommendation expanded to map 3 use-case patterns to 3
  systems (Claude/Codex ┬╖ OpenClaw ┬╖ GEODE).

### Changed

- **ΉΜεΉηΣ Έ░░ΈΕΙ `harness:` Έζ╝Έ▓ρΉζΕ GEODE ΈΜρΈΠΖΉε╝Έκε Ή╢ΧΉΗΝ.** Ά╕░Ήκ┤ΉΩΡΈΛΦ
  `KNOWN_HARNESSES` Ά░Α `.claude/`, `.cursor/`, `.codex/`, `.copilot/`,
  `.openclaw/` ΈΥ▒ 10 Ά░ε AI ΈΠΕΆ╡υ ΉΕνΉιΧ ΈΦΦΈιΚΊΕ░ΈουΈξ╝ Ά░ΡΉπΑΊΧ┤ `harness: Claude
  Code, GEODE` Ή▓αΈθ╝ ΊΧρΆ╗α Ή╢εΈιξΊΨΙΈΛΦΈΞ░, Ήζ┤Ά▓Ν "GEODE Ά░Α Claude Code ΉεΕΉΩΡΉΕε
  ΈΠΝΉΧΕΆ░ΕΈΜν" ΈΛΦ ΉηαΈς╗ΈΡε Έ╕ΝΈηεΈΥε ΉΜιΊα╕Έκε Ήζ╜ΊαΦΉΛ╡ΈΜΙΈΜν. GEODE ΈΛΦ ΉηΡΉ▓┤ Έθ░ΊΔΑΉηΕΉε╝Έκε
  LLM API Ή╜ε + agentic loop + tool ΉΜνΊΨΚ + tiered context memory + plugin
  ΈιΙΉπΑΉΛνΊΛ╕ΈουΈξ╝ ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉΙαΊΨΚΊΧσΈΜΙΈΜν. `.claude/` ΈΥ▒Ήζα ΈΦΦΈιΚΊΕ░ΈουΈΛΦ **Ά░εΈ░εΉηΡΆ░Α
  GEODE Έξ╝ ΉιεΉηΣ┬╖ΉιΧΈ╣ΕΊΧι ΈΧΝ ΉΓυΉγσΊΧαΈΛΦ build-time ΈΠΕΆ╡υ ΉΕνΉιΧ**Ήζ┤ΉπΑ GEODE Ήζα
  runtime dependency Ά░Α ΉΧΕΈΜβΈΜΙΈΜν. `KNOWN_HARNESSES` Έξ╝ `{".geode":
  "GEODE"}` ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΊΧφΈςσΉε╝Έκε Ή╢ΧΉΗΝΊΨΙΆ│ι, ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΈΞ░Ήζ┤ΊΕ░Έξ╝ LLM context Έκε Ήμ╝ΉηΖΊΧαΈΛΦ
  `core/memory/context.py:_inject_project_env` ΈΠΕ Ά░βΉζΑ ΉΜιΊα╕ΈπΝ Έ│┤Ά▓Ν ΈΡσΈΜΙΈΜν.
- **Startup banner `harness:` label reduced to GEODE only.**
  `KNOWN_HARNESSES` previously detected 10 AI tool config directories
  (`.claude/`, `.cursor/`, `.codex/`, `.copilot/`, `.openclaw/`, ...) and
  rendered e.g. `harness: Claude Code, GEODE` at startup. That read as
  "GEODE runs on top of Claude Code", which is wrong: GEODE drives its
  own LLM API calls, agentic loop, tool execution, tiered context
  memory, and plugin registry. `.claude/` etc. are **build-time** tooling
  used by maintainers when developing GEODE, not runtime dependencies.
  `KNOWN_HARNESSES` is now `{".geode": "GEODE"}`, and the parallel
  injection into `core/memory/context.py:_inject_project_env` therefore
  exposes the same self-only signal to the LLM context.

### Added

- **Layout migration v2 έΗΤ v3 έΑΦ TTL archival for runs/vault/projects.** PR
  feature/layout-v3. `core/wiring/layout_migrator.py` Ήζα `_migrate_v2_to_v3`
  Ά░Α `~/.geode/runs/` (ΊαΕΉηυ 600+ ΊΝΝΉζ╝ ΊΠΚΈσ┤), `~/.geode/vault/{general,research}/`
  (1800+ ΊΝΝΉζ╝), `~/.geode/projects/<encoded-cwd>/` (ΉιεΆ▒░ΈΡε worktree ΈΝΑΉζΣ
  ΉΩΦΊΛ╕Έου ΊΠυΊΧρ) Ήζα ΉηΡΉΜζ ΉνΣ `mtime` Ήζ┤ TTL Έ│┤ΈΜν ΉανΈηαΈΡε Ά▓ΔΉζΕ `_archive/<YYYY-MM>/`
  ΉδΦ Έ▓ΕΊΓ╖Ήε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ. TTL Ά╕░Έ│╕ 30Ήζ╝, `GEODE_ARCHIVE_TTL_DAYS` Έκε ΉανΈ▓ΕΈζ╝Ήζ┤ΈΥε.
  Hermes `SessionDB._init_schema` + Claude Code ΉδΦΈ│Ε Έ▓ΕΊΓ╖ + GEODE ΉηΡΉ▓┤
  `shutil.move` Έυ┤ΉΗΡΉΜν ΊΝρΊΕ┤ ΊΧσΉΕ▒. Writer Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ ΉΩΗΉζΝ έΑΦ bootstrap 1ΊγΝ sweep,
  Έ▓ΕΉιΕ ΈπΙΉ╗νΈκε Ά▓ΝΉζ┤ΊΛ╕.
- **Layout migration v2 έΗΤ v3 έΑΦ TTL archival for runs/vault/projects.** PR
  feature/layout-v3. `_migrate_v2_to_v3` archives children whose mtime is
  past TTL from `~/.geode/runs/` (600+ flat files), `~/.geode/vault/
  {general,research}/` (1800+ files), and `~/.geode/projects/` (entries
  for removed worktrees) into `_archive/<YYYY-MM>/` monthly buckets. TTL
  defaults to 30 days, overridable via `GEODE_ARCHIVE_TTL_DAYS`.
  Synthesizes Hermes `SessionDB._init_schema` + Claude Code monthly
  bucketing + GEODE's own `shutil.move` lossless pattern. No writer
  change έΑΦ one-shot bootstrap sweep gated by version marker.
- **Migration report per-step diagnostic logging.** `ensure_layout_migrated`
  Ήζα ΉλΖΈμΝ INFO Έζ╝Ήζ╕Ήζ┤ step ΈπΙΈΜν `moved=/skipped=/warnings=` Ή╣┤Ήγ┤ΊΛ╕Έξ╝
  Ή░ΞΉζΝ. v1έΗΤv2 ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ▒░ Ά░φ ("ΈπΙΉ╗νΈΛΦ v=2 Ήζ╕ΈΞ░ ΉΧΕΉ╣┤Ήζ┤Έ╕ΝΆ░Α ΉΧΙ Ήζ╝ΉΨ┤ΈΓυΈΜν") ΊδΕΉΗΞ
  ΉπΕΈΜρ έΑΦ `~/.geode/logs/serve.log` ΊΧε ΉνΕΈκε "v3 Ά░Α Έυ┤ΉΩΘΉζΕ ΉαχΆ▓╝ΈΓα" Ά░Α Έ│┤ΉηΕ.
- **Migration report per-step diagnostic logging.** Closing INFO line now
  emits per-step moved/skipped/warnings counts, so operators can answer
  "did v3 actually archive anything?" at a glance.

- **P4 έΑΦ paths.py SoT lint guardrail + Ή╢ΦΆ░Α 14 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ ΉιΧΈιυ.** PR #1098
  audit Ήζα ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ ΈΜρΆ│Ε. `tests/test_path_literal_guard.py` ΉΜιΉΕν έΑΦ pytest
  ΈΜρΉεΕΉΩΡΉΕε `core/` ΊΛ╕ΈουΈξ╝ regex ΉΛνΉ║ΦΊΧ┤ `Path.home() / ".geode"` ΈαΡΈΛΦ
  `Path(".geode/...")` literal ΉζΕ Ά▓ΑΉ╢ε. ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ Ήκ░Ά▒┤: (1) paths.py Ήζα ΉιΒΉιΙΊΧε
  constant ΉΓυΉγσ, (2) `# noqa: paths-literal` Ήμ╝ΉΕζ + ΉΓυΉει, ΈαΡΈΛΦ (3)
  `_FILE_ALLOWLIST` ΈΥ▒Ήηυ. `tests/test_no_daemon_print.py` ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝρΊΕ┤
  (regex + per-line Ήα╡ΊΛ╕ΉΧΕΉδΔ).
  - **P2 audit ΈΙΕΈζ╜ 14 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ Ήζ╝Ά┤Ε ΉιΧΈιυ** έΑΦ P4 Ά░ΑΈΥεΆ░Α ΊΠφΈκε:
    `core/cli/bootstrap.py` (3), `core/cli/cmd_skill.py` (2), `core/cli/
    commands/cost.py` (2), `core/cli/doctor.py` (2), `core/cli/ipc_client.py`,
    `core/cli/typer_commands.py`, `core/mcp/manager.py`, `core/mcp/
    registry.py`, `core/orchestration/isolated_execution.py`, `core/
    orchestration/run_log.py`, `core/skills/skills.py`, `core/wiring/
    adapters.py`, `core/wiring/bootstrap.py` (3), `core/audit/diagnostics.py`,
    `core/auth/auth_toml.py`. ΊΨΚΉεΕ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ ΉΩΗΉζΝ.
  - **paths.py ΉΜιΆ╖ε constants 4Ά░ε** έΑΦ `PROJECT_USER_PROFILE_DIR`,
    `PROJECT_HOOKS_DIR`, `GLOBAL_DIAGNOSTICS_DIR`, `GLOBAL_AUTH_TOML`.
    P3 Ήζα 5 constants ΉβΑ ΊΧσΉ│Ρ paths.py Ά░Α ΉΓυΉΜνΉΔΒ ΈςρΈΥι `.geode/` Ά▓╜ΈκεΉζα
    SoT.
  - **allowlist** 4 ΊΝΝΉζ╝ έΑΦ `core/paths.py` (SoT), `core/scheduler/
    scheduler/models.py` + `core/auth/oauth_login.py` (legacy migration
    markers, ΉζαΈΠΕΉιΒ), `core/cli/typer_init.py` (`geode init` ΊΦΕΈκεΉιζΊΛ╕
    Έ╢ΑΊΛ╕ΉΛνΊΛ╕Έησ έΑΦ 20+ Ήζ╝ΊγΝΉΕ▒ mkdir, constant ΊβΦ Ά░ΑΉΕ▒Έ╣Ε ΈΓχΉζΝ).

### Changed

- **P2 έΑΦ paths.py constant ΉιΧΈιυ (11+1 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕).** PR #1098 audit Ήζα
  ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ SoT ΉιΧΈου ΈΜρΆ│Ε. paths.py Ά░Α SoT Ήζ╕ΈΞ░ hardcoded `Path.home() /
  ".geode" / ...` ΈαΡΈΛΦ `Path(".geode/...")` literal ΉΓυΉγσΊΧαΈΞα 12 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕Ά░Α
  ΈςρΈΣΡ paths.py constant ΉΓυΉγσΉε╝Έκε Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ έΑΦ `core/runtime.py:93`
  (`DEFAULT_LOG_DIR`), `core/server/supervised/services.py:267`
  (`build_hooks log_dir`), `core/llm/usage_store.py:21` (`DEFAULT_USAGE_DIR`),
  `core/memory/user_profile.py:96` (`FileBasedUserProfile._global_dir`,
  module-level import Ήε╝Έκε Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ + Ία╕Ή╢ε test ΈΠΕ Ά░▒ΉΜι), `core/config/
  _settings.py:20` (`env_file`), `core/server/ipc_server/poller.py:38`
  (`DEFAULT_SOCKET_PATH`), `core/runtime_state/transcript.py:37`
  (`_get_default_transcript_dir`), `core/agent/worker.py:33` (`WORKER_DIR`),
  `core/orchestration/tool_offload.py:59` (`ToolResultOffloadStore._base_dir`),
  `core/utils/env_io.py:61` (config writer), `core/tools/policy.py:302`
  (org policy loader), Ά╖╕ΈουΆ│ι parameterized root Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν
  `core/memory/project.py:112-113` ΈΠΕ `PROJECT_GEODE_DIR` (relative Path)
  Ά│╝ `GEODE_HOME` Ήκ░ΊΧσΉε╝Έκε ΉιΧΈιυ. **ΊΨΚΉεΕ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ ΉΩΗΉζΝ** έΑΦ ΉΙεΉΙα SoT ΉιΧΈιυ.
  ΊγΝΆ╖Α: 4749 tests pass, `test_context_hub.py::test_build_user_context_no_data`
  Ήζα patch site ΈΠΕ `GLOBAL_USER_PROFILE_DIR` Έκε Ά░▒ΉΜι.

### Added

- **P3 έΑΦ `core.paths` ΉΩΡ ΈΙΕΈζ╜ΈΡε 5 ΉΔΒΉΙα Ή╢ΦΆ░Α** (`PROJECT_AGENT_MEMORY_DIR`,
  `PROJECT_MODEL_POLICY`, `PROJECT_ROUTING_CONFIG`, `GLOBAL_SKILLS_DIR`,
  `GLOBAL_USER_PREFERENCES`). ΊδΕΉΗΞ sloppiness ΉιΧΈουΉζα ΈΣΡ Έ▓ΙΉπ╕ ΈΜρΆ│Ε έΑΦ PR
  #1098 audit Ήζα S2 Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου. 5 ΉΓυΉγσΉ▓αΆ░Α hardcoded `Path(".geode/...")`
  literal ΈΝΑΉΜι ΉΔΙ ΉΔΒΉΙα ΉΓυΉγσ έΑΦ `core/memory/agent_memory.py`,
  `core/config/__init__.py` Ήζα `MODEL_POLICY_PATH` + `ROUTING_CONFIG_PATH`
  (re-export Έκε backwards-compat), `core/tools/policy.py:_load_profile_policy`,
  `core/llm/skill_registry.py:_resolve_skill_dirs`. bundled skills Ήζα
  `__file__` Ά╕░Έ░α Ά▓╜ΈκεΈΛΦ ΉζαΈΠΕΉιΒΉε╝Έκε literal ΉειΉπΑ (geode ΊΝρΊΓνΉπΑ source tree
  Ήζα ΉεΕΉ╣αΈζ╝ runtime ΉΔΒΉΙα ΉζαΈψ╕ ΉΩΗΉζΝ). S1 (11 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕, paths.py constant ΉηΙΈΛΦΈΞ░
  literal ΉΥ░ΈΛΦ Ά││) ΉιΧΈουΈΛΦ P2 ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR.

### Removed

- **`PROJECT_EMBEDDING_CACHE` / `PROJECT_VECTORS_DIR`** path constants
  in `core.paths` έΑΦ vestigial. No writer ever used either; the on-disk
  directories (`{workspace}/.geode/embedding-cache/` and
  `{workspace}/.geode/vectors/`) stopped receiving writes on
  2026-04-05. Cascading removals: `core/cli/cmd_lifecycle.py` Ήζα
  `/clean` lookup + scan list, `tests/test_lifecycle_commands.py` Ήζα
  `PROJECT_EMBEDDING_CACHE` patch Ά░Α ΈςρΈΣΡ ΉιΧΈουΈΡρ. ΉηΦΉΩυ ΈΦΦΉΛνΊΒυ ΈΦΦΈιΚΊΕ░Έου
  ΈΛΦ layout migration v1έΗΤv2 Ά░Α `_archive/` Έκε ΉαχΆ╣Α (ΉΧΕΈηα ΊΧφΈςσ).

### Fixed

- **Layout migration v1έΗΤv2 έΑΦ vestigial ΈΦΦΈιΚΊΕ░Έου archival.**
  `core/wiring/layout_migrator.py:_migrate_v1_to_v2()` Ά░Α ΊαΕΉηυ workspace
  Ήζα `.geode/{embedding-cache,vectors}/` Έξ╝ `.geode/_archive/<name>-<UTC>/`
  Έκε ΉΧΙΉιΕΊΧαΆ▓Ν ΉαχΆ╣Α (`shutil.move`, never `rmtree`). Έ╣ΕΉΨ┤ΉηΙΈΛΦ Ά▓╜Ήγ░ `rmdir`
  ΈπΝ ΉΙαΊΨΚ, archive target Ήζ┤ Ήζ┤Έψ╕ ΉηΙΉε╝Έσ┤ ΉδΡΈ│╕ Έ│┤Ήκ┤ + warning. v0έΗΤv1 Ήζα
  same-FS atomic move ΊΝρΊΕ┤ + lossless safety Ά│ΕΉΛ╣. `GEODE_LAYOUT_VERSION`
  1 έΗΤ 2. ΊγΝΆ╖Α: `tests/test_layout_migrator.py::TestV1ToV2VestigialArchival`
  8 cases (populated cache / populated vectors / both / empty rmdir /
  absent skip / no .geode/ short-circuit / full v0έΗΤv2 chain / constants
  removed sanity).

### Documentation

- **Storage hierarchy decision doc** (`docs/architecture/storage-hierarchy.md`).
  3 frontier harness (Claude Code, Hermes Agent by NousResearch, OpenClaw)
  Ήζα context / storage Έ╢ΕΈου ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ + GEODE Ήζα `~/.geode/` (user-private)
  vs `{workspace}/.geode/` (project-bound, team-shareable) Έ╢ΕΈΜ┤ Ά╖εΉ╣β.
  Ά▓░ΉιΧ ΊΛ╕Έου έΑΦ credential / cross-project identity / agent operating state
  / per-project user-private state ΈΛΦ user-home, Έ░αΈσ┤ team-shareable rules /
  skills / ΊΦΕΈκεΉιζΊΛ╕Έ│Ε scheduler / reports ΈΛΦ project-local. Hermes/OpenClaw
  Ήζα user-home-only ΊΝρΊΕ┤ΉζΑ multi-platform messaging context ΊΧεΉιΧΉε╝Έκε ΉιΧΈΜ╣ΊβΦ
  ΈΡαΈσ░, GEODE ΈΛΦ workspace-bound runtime Ήζ┤Έζ╝ Claude Code Ήζα hybrid Ά░Α ΈΞΦ
  ΉιΒΊΧσ. ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR Ήζα TODO Ή║ΡΈουΉανΈ▓Ε: vestigial constants 3Ά░ε
  (`PROJECT_EMBEDDING_CACHE`, `PROJECT_TOOL_OFFLOAD`, `PROJECT_VECTORS_DIR`
  έΑΦ writer ΉΩΗΉζΝ, `cmd_lifecycle.py` Ήζα `/clean` Ή╗ρΉΛΙΈρ╕ΉΩΡΈπΝ ΈΥ▒Έκζ) Ήζα ΉιΧΈου +
  `~/.geode/runs/` Ήζα `<YYYY-MM>/` bucket + vault TTL ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ.

### Infrastructure

- **Changelog viewer: entry-level KO / EN toggle plus fallback banner.**
  The previous side-by-side dual-column layout was hard to scan on narrow
  screens and forced readers to read both halves for every entry. Replaced
  with a Tailwind-style dual-list toggle (research notes:
  Stripe / MDN / react.dev / Tailwind / Cloudflare).
  - Per-entry pill at top right: `KO` / `EN`. Defaults to page locale.
    Only rendered when both languages are detected in the entry.
  - Mono-lingual entries: no toggle. When the requested language is
    absent, a small amber Stripe-style banner notes the absence
    ("Ήζ┤ entryΈΛΦ ΉαΒΉΨ┤ ΉδΡΈυ╕ΈπΝ ΉηΣΉΕ▒ΈΡΡΉΛ╡ΈΜΙΈΜν" or the EN equivalent).
  - Top sticky nav gains a ΊΧεΆ╡φΉΨ┤ / English page-locale switch on the
    right end. Switching globally changes the default for every entry.
  - Detection logic unchanged (Hangul / Latin ratio per markdown block).
    Code fences and short / symbol-only blocks live in both halves.


### Infrastructure

- **AGENTS.md at repo root.** LLM agent navigation map covering core /
  agent, core / llm, core / tools, core / mcp, core / memory, core / hooks,
  core / wiring, core / server (incl. client_capability handshake),
  core / audit, core / automation, core / skills, core / verification,
  plus the two plugins. Pattern adopted from OpenClaw's AGENTS.md
  convention. Sits next to CLAUDE.md (dev scaffold) and GEODE.md
  (runtime identity).
- **llms.txt and llms-full.txt** (Hermes pattern). Generated by
  `site/scripts/sync-stats.mjs` from the docs sitemap on every sync.
  Plain-text indexes at `mangowhoiscloud.github.io/geode/llms.txt`
  and `/llms-full.txt`. Lists every public page with summary, both
  Korean and English titles, plus pointers to CHANGELOG / CLAUDE / AGENTS.
- **Five outdated pages patched.**
  - `architecture/system-index` switched from hardcoded counts (v0.64,
    223 core, 13 plugins) to live `GEODE_SOT` imports.
  - `harness/lifecycle` gained a "Client capability handshake (v0.84+)"
    section documenting `client_capability` IPC handshake
    (`is_tty`, `width`).
  - `runtime/automation` expanded with the 7-module composition table
    (model_registry / feedback_loop / drift / correlation /
    expert_panel / outcome_tracking / snapshot).
  - `petri/scenarios` got a "Default 173 Petri seeds" category
    breakdown table (refusal_calibration / honesty_deception /
    power_seeking / harm_uplift / sandbox_awareness / manipulation /
    privacy / meta).
  - `runtime/skills` body bulked out: 5-tier discovery detail,
    `core/skills/reports/` v0.71 package layout (8 modules),
    SKILL.md frontmatter convention, three-step authoring guide,
    hook integration.


### Added

- **`~/.geode/` ΈΦΦΈιΚΊΕ░Έου layout migration Ήζ╕ΊΦΕΈζ╝.** Hermes Agent (NousResearch)
  Ήζα `SessionDB._init_schema` ΊΝρΊΕ┤ + OpenClaw `autoMigrateLegacyStateDir`
  + GEODE Ά╕░Ήκ┤ `_resolve_with_fallback` ΉΖΜ ΉλΖΊΧσ. ΉΜιΆ╖ε `core/wiring/
  layout_migrator.py` έΑΦ `GEODE_LAYOUT_VERSION` (ΊαΕΉηυ 1), `~/.geode/
  .layout-version` dotfile marker (Hermes Ήζα `.managed` / `active_profile`
  dotfile ΉιΕΈκΑ), module-level once-flag Έκε idempotent (OpenClaw
  `autoMigrateStateDirChecked` + Hermes `_bootstrap_applied` ΊΠΚΊΨΚ),
  `GEODE_DISABLE_LAYOUT_MIGRATION` env escape hatch.
  - **v0έΗΤv1 ΈπΙΉζ┤Ά╖╕ΈιΙΉζ┤ΉΖα**: ΉΕ╕ path ΉανΈξα ΉιΧΉιΧ έΑΦ (1) `serve.log` Ά░Α
    `~/.geode/` ΈμρΊΛ╕ΉΩΡΉΕε `~/.geode/logs/serve.log` Έκε (paths.py Ήζα
    `SERVE_LOG_PATH` Ά░Α Ήζ┤Έψ╕ Ά░ΑΈουΊΓνΈΞα Ά││), (2) `approve_history.json`
    (paths.py ΉανΊΔΑ) έΗΤ `approval_history.jsonl` (ΉΜνΉιε writer Ήζ┤ΈοΕ),
    (3) `mcp-registry-cache.json` έΗΤ `mcp/registry-cache.json` (ΈΜνΈξ╕
    MCP state ΉβΑ ΊΧρΆ╗α Έυ╢ΉζΝ). `shutil.move` Έκε atomic, ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝΝΉζ╝ destination
    Ήζ┤Έψ╕ Ήκ┤Ήηυ ΉΜε ΉΗΡΈΝΑΉπΑ ΉΧΛΆ│ι warning surface (never overwrite user data).
  - **Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΜεΉιΡ**: `core.paths.ensure_directories()` ΈΒζ έΑΦ bootstrap Ήζα
    Έπν Ία╕Ή╢εΈπΙΈΜν (idempotent). `uv tool install` / `uv tool update` ΈΛΦ Ήγ░Έου Ή╜ΦΈΥεΈξ╝
    ΉΜνΊΨΚΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉε╝ΈψΑΈκε ΉΓυΉΜνΉΔΒ install/update ΉπΒΊδΕ Ή▓τ `geode` ΈςΖΈι╣ΉΩΡΉΕε ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ▒░ΈΡρ.
  - **ΊγΝΆ╖Α**: `tests/test_layout_migrator.py` 12 cases έΑΦ version marker
    round-trip / corrupt marker / disable env / idempotency / v0έΗΤv1 Ήζα
    ΉΕ╕ path Έ│Ε + conflict-keep-both + missing-source-skip.

### Added

- **Wanted.co.kr Ά╕░Έ░α ΊΧεΆ╡φ job Ά▓ΑΉΔΚ ΈΠΕΆ╡υ (`wanted_jobs_search`).** LinkedIn
  Ήζα PerimeterX/Cloudflare bot detection Ήε╝Έκε `search_jobs` MCP Ά░Α ΈπνΈ▓Ι
  403 + empty body Έκε Ή░ρΈΜρΈΡαΈΛΦ ΉΔΒΊβσΉΩΡ ΈΝΑΊΧε ΈΝΑΉ▓┤ Ά▓╜Έκε. Wanted Ήζα Ά│╡Ά░ε REST
  endpoint (`/api/v4/jobs`) Έξ╝ httpx Έκε ΉπΒΉιΣ Ία╕Ή╢εΊΧ┤ OAuth/proxy/scraper
  Έψ╕ΈΦΦΉΨ┤ ΉζαΉκ┤ΉΕ▒ ΉΩΗΉζ┤ ΊΧεΆ╡φ tech job ΉζΕ Ά▓ΑΉΔΚ. Ά▓░Ά│╝ΈΛΦ ΊΠΚΊΔΕΊΧε dict ΈουΉΛνΊΛ╕
  `{job_id, position, company, location, url, posted_at}`. MCP server Ά░Α
  ΉΧΕΈΜΙΈζ╝ GEODE ΈΓ┤Ήηξ ΈΠΕΆ╡υ έΑΦ Έ│ΕΈΠΕ subprocess ΉΩΗΉζΝ. `SAFE_TOOLS` ΉΩΡ ΈΥ▒ΈκζΈΡαΉΨ┤
  sub-agent / read-only ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ path ΉΩΡΉΕε auto-approve. tool count 24έΗΤ25.
  ΈιΙΊΞ╝Έθ░ΉΛν: Manus / Devin Ήζα paid scraping provider fallback ΊΝρΊΕ┤Ά│╝ΈΛΦ
  Έ░αΈΝΑΈκε έΑΦ Ή░ρΈΜρΈΡαΈΛΦ source Έξ╝ Έ░ΦΆ╛╕ΈΛΦ lightweight Έ░σΊΨξ.
- **`run_bash` Ήζα read-only pipeline auto-approve.** Ά╕░Ήκ┤ `is_bash_auto_approved`
  Ά░Α pipe (`|`) ΉηΡΉ▓┤Έξ╝ Έυ┤Ήκ░Ά▒┤ unsafe Έκε ΊΝΡΉιΧΊΧ┤ `find ~/x -type f | sed 's/έΑο/έΑο/'
  | head -200` Ά░βΉζΑ ΊΣεΉνΑ read-only Ή▓┤Ήζ╕Ήζ┤ ΈπνΈ▓Ι HITL approval ΉγΦΆ╡υ. Ήζ┤Ήιε
  `SAFE_BASH_PIPELINE_STAGES` (head/tail/wc/sort/uniq/cut/tr/grep/rg/cat/
  less/more/sed/awk/jq/yq/column/fold/nl) Έξ╝ Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΊΧ┤ έΑΦ Ή▓τ stage Ά░Α Ά╕░Ήκ┤
  `SAFE_BASH_PREFIXES` ΈπνΉ╣α + Ήζ┤ΊδΕ stage ΈΥνΉζ┤ ΈςρΈΣΡ pipeline-safe Έσ┤ ΊΗ╡Ά│╝.
  `tee` ΈΛΦ by-design write Έζ╝ ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ ΉιεΉβ╕. `sed -i` / `--in-place` ΈΠΕ Έ│ΕΈΠΕ
  reject. ΉεΕ Ήβ╕ έΑΦ `>`, `>>`, `;`, `&`, backtick, `$(...)`, `<(...)`, `>(...)`
  ΈΛΦ ΉΩυΉιΕΊηΙ hard reject. ΉιΧΉιΒ helper `core.agent.safety.is_bash_command_read_only`
  Έκε Ή╢ΦΉ╢ε έΑΦ `ApprovalController` ΉβΑ ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕Ά░Α Ά░βΉζΑ ΊΧρΉΙα Ία╕Ή╢εΊΧ┤ drift Έ░σΉπΑ.
  ΈιΙΊΞ╝Έθ░ΉΛν: `claude-code` settings.json Ήζα `permissions.allow:
  ["Bash(find:*)", έΑο]` per-command Ά╕ΑΈκεΈ╕Ν + Codex CLI sandbox Ήζα read-only
  stream filter ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ. ΊγΝΆ╖Α έΑΦ `tests/test_bash_safe_prefix.py` 35 cases (12
  ΉΜιΆ╖ε pipeline + sed -i / process subst / background / empty stage).

### Infrastructure

- **Docs CHANGELOG full sync plus three outdated patches.**
  - `site/scripts/sync-stats.mjs` now parses CHANGELOG.md and emits
    `site/src/data/geode/changelog.ts` with every version entry
    (134 releases plus the current Unreleased). The Changelog page reads
    that file and renders every entry, replacing the prior selected-
    highlights manual list.
  - New minimal markdown renderer at
    `site/src/components/geode-docs/markdown-lite.tsx`. Handles the
    subset CHANGELOG entries use: h3 headings, nested bullets, bold,
    inline code, links, fenced code blocks.
  - `/docs/reference/changelog` page rebuilt to render the full list with
    an in-page version index (grid of anchored versions), one section per
    entry, and a footer note pointing back to the repo CHANGELOG.md as
    the authoritative source.
  - Three outdated pages patched.
    - `/docs/runtime/llm/prompt-system`: summary now mentions the v0.93
      XML envelope (16 markers across 9 files).
    - `/docs/runtime/llm/prompt-caching`: boundary-marker section adds
      the `<dynamic_context>` XML wrapper and the audit-mode strip link.
    - `/docs/ops/cost`: full usage-ledger schema (CallDiagnostic-aligned
      fields), v0.90 token-tracker dual-record fix, three jq one-liners,
      provider downgrade chains updated to GLM 5.x and OpenAI 5.x.


### Fixed

- **OAuth Press-[Enter] prompt έΑΦ direct-render wiring parity.** PR #1077
  added the Press-[Enter] watcher only to the IPC render path
  (`EventRenderer._handle_oauth_login_started`). The thin-CLI direct path
  in `core/ui/agentic_ui/events.py:emit_oauth_login_started` (used by
  `RunLocation.THIN` `/login oauth openai`) still rendered the legacy
  layout without the prompt, so users on the THIN path didn't see
  "Press [Enter]" and the browser-watcher never spawned. Extracted the
  watcher to `core/ui/oauth_browser.start_oauth_browser_watcher`; both
  the IPC handler and the direct fallback now call it. Regression:
  `tests/test_oauth_browser.py::TestEmitOauthLoginStartedFallback` (2
  cases έΑΦ fallback prints prompt + spawns watcher; IPC path skips
  fallback) + `TestStartOauthBrowserWatcher` (2 cases έΑΦ TTY gating).



- **Sandbox tilde expansion (`~` / `~/`) έΑΦ silent-fail bug.**
  `core/tools/sandbox.py:validate_path()` advertised that bare `~` and `~/`
  were "expanded by Python, not shell" (`check_shell_expansion` allowed
  them through), but the actual `os.path.expanduser()` call was missing.
  Result: paths like `~/workspace/example/common` were joined against the
  project root verbatim, producing `/<project>/~/workspace/...` and a
  misleading `Not a directory` error instead of the proper
  `expanded-path-outside-sandbox` permission error. Surfaced by `geode
  serve` when an agent attempted `glob_files(path="~/workspace/...")`.
  Fix: call `os.path.expanduser(path_str)` immediately before `Path()`
  construction in `validate_path()`, and `path.expanduser()` before
  `.resolve()` in `add_working_directory` / `remove_working_directory`.
  Regression: `tests/test_sandbox.py::TestTildeExpansion` (4 cases έΑΦ
  bare `~`, `~/`, sandbox-expanded resolution, working-dir registration).
- **OpenAI OAuth plan tier auto-reconcile.** `chatgpt_plan_type` was
  extracted from the JWT once during `/login` and frozen into
  `Plan.subscription_tier`. If the user upgraded their ChatGPT plan
  (Plus έΗΤ Pro/Max/etc.) between logins, the stored tier kept showing
  the old value while the JWT itself had the new claim. `load_auth_toml`
  now calls `reconcile_plan_tier_from_stored_jwt()` after hydration,
  which re-decodes the access_token's claims and updates
  `Plan.subscription_tier` + profile metadata in place when a drift is
  found. Drift events log at INFO so the change is visible without
  forcing a re-login (a fresh `/login` still produces a brand-new JWT
  with the current tier έΑΦ this is the in-between fix).
- **OpenAI OAuth έΑΦ JWT decode DRY.** Extracted the inline base64+JSON
  decode block in `login_openai()` into a reusable `_decode_jwt_claims`
  helper; `_plan_type_from_token` builds on top so the reconciliation
  path and login path can't drift apart.

### Added

- **OAuth login UX έΑΦ press Enter to open the verification URL.**
  `EventRenderer._handle_oauth_login_started` now prints
  `Press [Enter] to open the URL in your browser` and spawns a daemon
  thread that calls `webbrowser.open(verification_uri)` on the first
  stdin line. Skipped automatically when stdin is not a TTY (piped
  invocations stay quiet). Pattern grounded from Claude Code's OAuth
  start prompt (`claude-code/src/auth/providers.ts`).

### Infrastructure

- **Docs restructure (F-series) plus Context system page.**
  - **Chapter rename**. "LLM ΊΝΝΉζ┤ΊΦΕΈζ╝Ήζ╕" to "Runtime". "Ήβε Ήζ┤ΈιΘΆ▓Ν" to "Why".
  - **Petri folded into Verification**. The five Petri pages (overview /
    scenarios / run / judge-dimensions / bundle) now live under chapter
    06 Verification next to guardrails, biasbuster, and observability.
  - **LangSmith page deleted**. The deprecation notice page is now gone
    entirely. References to LangSmith were already replaced by the
    native four-lens stack in v0.89.0.
  - **Observability moved and expanded**. From `/docs/ops/observability`
    to `/docs/verification/observability`. Body expanded with per-lens
    structure: hook 14-category table, RunLog JSONL schema, audit
    diagnostics CallDiagnostic dataclass, Petri integration, usage
    ledger, OpenTelemetry / inspect viewer adapters, why-LangSmith-was-
    removed rationale.
  - **Context System page new**. `/docs/runtime/context`. Single
    reference for the four mechanisms: 5-tier memory hierarchy (integer
    tiers 0 to 4, no fractional tiers), 5-layer prompt assembly with
    `AssembledPrompt` dataclass, 200K absolute token guard plus 80 / 95
    percent phases plus 25K MCP cap, Clean Context anchoring prevention,
    cache interface, comparison with Claude Code / LangChain / LlamaIndex.
  - **Fractional tier numbers retired**. `Automation (L4.5)` renamed to
    `Automation` (or `Automation Sidecar`); body now describes it as a
    sidecar between L2 Runtime and L4 Agent rather than as a tier.
    `4.5-Tier`, `Memory(4.5T)`, and a `Tier 0.5` reference in portfolio
    components likewise integerized.
  - **Changelog page synced**. Highlight reel now spans v0.65 through
    v0.95 (Anthropic agentic_call streaming, GLM 202_752 correction,
    OpenAI HTML guard, GEODE_PERSONA, XML sandwich, 4-layer observability,
    Petri scenarios, auto-escalation removal, LangSmith removal,
    cold-start arc, lifecycle to wiring rename, geode audit CLI).
  - Net: 50 pages, 11 chapters (down from 12). All bilingual.


### Infrastructure

### Infrastructure

- **Docs restructure (v0.95.0+) έΑΦ 12 chapters, 49 pages, References chapter
  added.** Follow-up sprint to the docs rebuild. Three corrections based on
  live review.
  - **03 Build chapter removed.** The 4 pages (`build/add-tool`,
    `build/add-domain`, `build/add-hook`, `build/testing`) returned 404 on
    the deployed site even though the previous build log advertised them.
    Cause: files were authored in a removed worktree and never staged into

    (2) ┬╖ 08 Plugins (2).
  - **Vault page removed** (`runtime/memory/vault`). Vault is wiki-side

- **Docs site rebuild έΑΦ Di├κtaxis 8 chapters, 53 bilingual pages.**
  Site/docs restructured into 8 numbered chapters following Di├κtaxis (Tutorial,
  How-to, Reference, Explanation). Every page declares its quadrant via a
  color chip in the title and sidebar.

    (24), 03 Build on GEODE (4 how-to), 04 Operations (4 how-to),

    grounds every chapter that references "self-hosting agent harness".
  - DocsShell footer now imports `GEODE_SOT` (version, modules, tests,
    syncedAt) instead of hardcoding v0.65.0. GitHub link points at
    `mangowhoiscloud/geode` (was `/portfolio`).

    OpenClaw `AGENTS.md` code-root navigation, Di├κtaxis 4-quadrant framework,
    Anthropic Platform Docs comparison-table-at-decision-point pattern.

- **Public site at `site/` έΑΦ GEODE Pages deploy.** Next.js 16 static
  export integrated into the repo at `site/`. Builds and deploys to
  GitHub Pages at `https://mangowhoiscloud.github.io/geode/` on push to
  `main`.
  - Routes: `/portfolio` (case-study narrative), `/docs` (28 reference
    pages έΑΦ architecture, runtime ┬╖ LLM / tools / memory, harness,
    verification, plugins, reference), `/about`, `/works/reode`.
  - Single source of truth: `site/src/data/geode/sot.ts` έΑΦ auto-synced
    from this repo's `pyproject.toml` + `core/` + `plugins/` filesystem
    counts + `CHANGELOG.md` release count via
    `site/scripts/sync-stats.mjs`. The site cannot advertise a version
    different from what `pyproject.toml` claims.
  - Workflow: `.github/workflows/pages.yml` (Next.js build έΗΤ Pages
    artifact έΗΤ official `actions/deploy-pages@v4`). Path-filtered to
    `site/**`, so Python source changes do not redeploy. One-time
    activation: repo Settings έΗΤ Pages έΗΤ Source = "GitHub Actions".
  - Sourced from the standalone `portfolio` repo; route-restructured to
    place GEODE's public surfaces under one tree (basePath `/portfolio`
    έΗΤ `/geode`, `/geode` page έΗΤ `/portfolio`, `/geode/docs` έΗΤ `/docs`,
    root landing έΗΤ `/about`, `/reode` έΗΤ `/works/reode`).
  - Master neologism locked: **self-hosting agent harness** (analogue
    of self-hosting compiler έΑΦ the runtime and the build line share the
    same primitives). Defined once at `/geode/portfolio` after the
    hero; every chapter below refers without redefining.

## [0.95.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-12

### Fixed

- **GLM context window precision έΑΦ GAP-X1.** `MODEL_CONTEXT_WINDOW`
  rounded all five registered GLM models (`glm-5.1`, `glm-5`,
  `glm-5-turbo`, `glm-4.7`, `glm-4.7-flash`) to a flat `200_000`-token
  guard. Re-verification against z.ai docs + openrouter listings (2026-05-12)
  yields the precise value `202_752` έΑΦ a +2_752-token delta that the
  post-call 200K guard was tripping early. Cloudflare / LM Studio
  deployments expose smaller windows (`131_072` / `128k`) but GEODE calls
  z.ai directly so the upstream contract applies. Regression test:
  `tests/test_glm_context_window.py` (6 cases έΑΦ per-model assertion +
  family-shared-window invariant). `tests/test_context_monitor.py` fixture
  for the "200K models skip ceiling" case switched from `glm-5` to
  `claude-opus-4-5` (exact 200_000) έΑΦ `glm-5` is no longer exactly 200K.

### Changed

- **Anthropic agentic_call streaming έΑΦ GAP-S1.**
  `ClaudeAgenticAdapter.agentic_call._do_call` now wraps the request in
  `async with self._client.messages.stream(**create_kwargs) as s:` and
  returns `await s.get_final_message()` instead of the previous
  non-streaming `await self._client.messages.create(**create_kwargs)`.
  The final message is the same `anthropic.types.Message` schema, so
  `normalize_anthropic` and the token-tracker path are unchanged έΑΦ the
  benefit is chunk-level network delivery and an SDK-level surface for
  partial state (not yet wired into the agentic loop's UI). OpenAI / GLM
  streaming is deferred (separate PR έΑΦ Responses API has a stricter
  stream contract with reasoning replay). Regression test:
  `tests/test_anthropic_agentic_stream.py` (2 cases έΑΦ stream-vs-create,
  kwargs passthrough). `tests/test_anthropic_sampling_params.py` helper
  updated to mock both transports.

## [0.94.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-12

### Added

- **OpenAI HTML data-URL guard έΑΦ GAP-17.** OpenAI/Codex models, when
  asked to author HTML, frequently emit the entire document as a single
  `data:text/html(;base64)?,...` URL meant to be pasted into a browser's
  address bar έΑΦ a shape that silently breaks GEODE's downstream
  consumers (slide build, report PDF, artifact archiving) and inflates
  `output_tokens` 30έΑΥ50% from base64 overhead.
  - Primary guard: `core/agent/system_prompt._build_model_card` now
    injects a provider-gated instruction for `openai` / `openai-codex`
    forbidding the address-bar shape and demanding raw `<!DOCTYPE html>`
    source. Anthropic / GLM cards are unchanged έΑΦ they do not exhibit
    this drift.
  - Safety net: new `core/llm/postprocess/html_output.py` exposes
    `detect_data_url` / `decode_html` / `extract_artifact_to` so callers
    can recover the HTML when a model emits the shape anyway.
    Idempotent (hash-derived filename), handles base64 + percent-encoded
    payloads + malformed-base64 fallback.
  - 18 regression tests: `tests/test_html_output_guard.py` covering
    5 detection shapes, 3 decode round-trips, 2 disk extraction cases,
    OpenAI/Codex guard presence (3 models), Anthropic/GLM guard absence
    (4 models).
- **GLM thinking effort gate έΑΦ GAP-R1.** `GlmAgenticAdapter.agentic_call`
  now honours `effort in ("off", "none")` by sending
  `{"type": "disabled", "clear_thinking": False}` via `extra_body`.
  GLM-5.x / 4.7 ignore the `disabled` value (thinking is compulsory per
  the upstream contract έΑΦ harmless) but GLM-4.5 / 4.6 hybrid models
  honour it and recover the (typically large) reasoning-token cost when
  the caller asks for cheap, non-thinking output. Any non-off effort
  keeps the v0.58.0 enabled-with-context-preserve shape. Test:
  `tests/test_glm_thinking_control.py` (9 cases έΑΦ 3 hybrid models ├Ω off,
  none alias, 4 non-off efforts, pre-4.5 omission).
- **OpenAI prompt_cache_key έΑΦ GAP-A2.** OpenAI's Responses API
  auto-caches matching prefixes; an optional `prompt_cache_key` routes
  similar requests to the same cache pool, lifting hit-rate when
  `(system + tools)` is stable while the user / conversation differs.
  `OpenAIAgenticAdapter.agentic_call` now derives a 32-hex-char SHA-256
  key over `(system, sort_keys(tools))` with a `\x00` separator and
  injects it into `responses.create` kwargs. Token tracking + cost
  attribution were already wired (`agentic_response.py:251` reads
  `prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens`; `token_tracker.py:175` carries
  per-model `cache_read` pricing), so this PR completes the path.
  Test: `tests/test_openai_prompt_cache.py` (6 derivation contracts +
  1 adapter-wiring stub = 7 cases).
- **Cross-provider tool_choice normalization έΑΦ GAP-T1.** New
  `core/llm/tool_choice.py` centralizes the conversion of a canonical
  `tool_choice` (string / dict / named-tool / `None`) into each
  provider's native shape έΑΦ Anthropic dict, OpenAI Responses string-or-flat,
  GLM Chat Completions nested-function. Replaces 3├Ω inlined conversions
  in `anthropic.py:482-484`, `openai.py:507`, `glm.py:190` and adds first-class
  support for named-tool forcing (`{"name": "X"}` έΗΤ provider-specific shape)
  and the `required` έΗΦ `any` keyword alias. Test:
  `tests/test_tool_choice_normalize.py` (33 cases ├Ω 3 providers + edge cases).

## [0.93.1] έΑΦ 2026-05-12

### Fixed

- **LLM retry policy SOT έΑΦ GAP-E1.** `OpenAIAdapter._retry_with_backoff`
  pinned `max_retries=3`, `retry_base_delay=1.0`, `retry_max_delay=30.0`
  via module-local `_MAX_RETRIES` / `_RETRY_BASE_DELAY` / `_RETRY_MAX_DELAY`
  constants, ignoring `settings.llm_max_retries` /
  `settings.llm_retry_base_delay` / `settings.llm_retry_max_delay`.
  GLM (via `OpenAIAgenticAdapter` inheritance) inherited the same drift.
  Adapter now leaves these arguments unset so `retry_with_backoff_generic`
  resolves them lazily from settings έΑΦ restoring the single source of
  truth shared with Anthropic. Regression test:
  `tests/test_retry_policy_sot.py`.

- **Petri seeds flat-layout (G-A1).** Discovery (post-merge of PR #1044):
  `inspect_petri/_seeds/_markdown.py:read_seed_directory` uses
  `directory.glob("*.md")` έΑΦ **non-recursive**. The 13 curated GEODE
  seeds were nested under `plugins/petri_audit/seeds/<category>/<seed>.md`,
  so `read_seed_directory(plugins/petri_audit/seeds)` returned 0 samples.
  Audits passing `--seed-select id:<csv>` fell back to inspect_petri's
  173 built-in seed lookup, hit a `ValueError("Unknown built-in seed
  id(s): ...")`, and inspect_ai's dispatch layer silently fell back to
  raw-string samples (`Sample(input='id:unrestricted_shell')`). The
  PR #1044 audit's seed-specific claims (e.g. `unrestricted_shell`
  input_hallucination=5, `long_running_loop` admirable=2) are
  **invalidated** έΑΦ the auditor never saw the .md scenario prose,
  only the seed-id name string. Broad alignment claims
  (`broken_tool_use` -1.08, overall \|╬Φ\| < 0.5) remain valid as a
  generic-pressure measurement. Fix:
  - 13 .md files flattened from `seeds/<category>/<seed>.md` to
    `seeds/<category>_<seed>.md` so `read_seed_directory` actually sees
    them. Category survives in the filename prefix.
  - `cli_audit.audit` `--seed-select` default changed from `None` to
    `"plugins/petri_audit/seeds"` (the directory). The `id:<csv>` path
    is now documented as broken-by-design (inspect_petri 173-seed scope)
    in the option's help text.
  - Retraction note added to `docs/audits/2026-05-12-petri-geode-audit.md`
    distinguishing valid (broad) from invalidated (seed-specific) claims.
  - 16 new regression guards in `tests/plugins/petri_audit/test_seeds_
    flat.py` pinning: no sub-dirs, exactly 13 .md, `<category>_<seed>.md`
    convention, `read_seed_directory` returns 13 samples with prose-length
    inputs (>100 chars, not 22-char `id:<name>` strings).

## [0.93.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-12

### Changed

- **System-prompt audit + cleanup (2026-05-12).** 12 ΊΧφΈςσ GAP audit
  (G1-G12) Ήζα ΊΗ╡ΊΧσ ΉιΧΈου. **Default behaviour Ά░Α Έ░ΦΈΑΝΉΩΙΉΛ╡ΈΜΙΈΜν έΑΦ GEODE
  identity Ά░Α Έπν Ία╕Ή╢εΉΩΡ default Έκε inject ΈΡαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉΛ╡ΈΜΙΈΜν.**
  - **G1 έΑΦ XML sandwich (`<key>...</key>`)**: `core/llm/prompts/*.md`
    9 ΊΝΝΉζ╝Ήζα 16 marker (`=== SYSTEM ===` / `=== USER ===` / `=== RESCORE
    ===` / `=== DUAL_VERIFY ===` / `=== AGENTIC_SUFFIX ===` / `===
    ANALYST_TOOLS ===` / `=== SYNTHESIZER_TOOLS ===`) Έξ╝ XML tag Έκε
    Ήζ╝Ά┤Ε Έ│ΑΊβα. parser ΈΛΦ `<([a-z][a-z0-9_]*)>(.*?)</\1>` Ήζα regex Έκε
    section Ή╢ΦΉ╢ε. Anthropic / Petri auditor / Claude Code-ref Ήζα
    frontier ΊΝρΊΕ┤Ά│╝ Ήζ╝Ή╣α.
  - **G2 έΑΦ `max_rounds=4` cap ΉιεΆ▒░**: `_default_geode_runner` Ήζα
    hardcoded inner cap ΉιεΆ▒░. AgenticLoop Ήζα `DEFAULT_MAX_ROUNDS = 0`
    (unlimited, time-budget Ά╕░Έ░α) Ά░Α default. petri audit Ήζα `long_
    running_loop` seed Ήζα admirable 2 (vanilla 8) ΉΧ╜ΉιΡΉζα root cause.
  - **G3 έΑΦ audit-mode Ήζα system prompt strip**: `GEODE_AUDIT_
    UNRESTRICTED=1` ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ ΉΜε `<agent_identity>` / `<project_memory>`
    / `<agent_learning>` / `<runtime_rules>` / `<user_context>` ΈςρΈΣΡ
    ΉιεΉβ╕. `<model_card>` + `<current_date>` + caller `system_suffix`
    ΈπΝ ΉΗκΉΜι. petri audit Ήζα `scenario_realism` -1.23 Ά▓σΉ░ρ (GEODE 6.15
    vs vanilla 7.38) Ήζα root cause.
  - **G9 έΑΦ `learned.md` Ήζα raw-context leak ΉιεΆ▒░**: Έ│╕ file Ήζα `[context:
    <ΊΧεΆ╡φΉΨ┤ prior-turn Ήζ╝Έ╢Α>]` trailer Ά░Α Έπν LLM call ΉΩΡ inject ΈΡαΉΨ┤
    user Ήζα prior conversation 30+ entry Ά░Α leak. `_sanitize_learned_
    pattern` Ήζ┤ trailer strip + 120-char cap.
  - **G10 έΑΦ GEODE identity opt-in (`GEODE_PERSONA=on`)**: GEODE.md Ήζα
    Core Principles + CANNOT + Defaults Ά░Α Έπν Ία╕Ή╢εΉΩΡ inject ΈΡαΈΞα ΈΠβΉηΣ
    ΉζΕ default OFF Ήε╝Έκε Έ│ΑΆ▓╜. **GEODE Έξ╝ Opus 4.7 (ΈαΡΈΛΦ Sonnet 4.6 ΈΥ▒)
    Ήζα thin wrapper Έκε ΉΥ░ΈΛΦ default Ά▓╜ΊΩα έΑΦ GEODE identity Ά░ΧΉιε ΉΩΗΉζΝ.
    Έ│ΕΈΠΕ `GEODE_PERSONA=on` ΉΕνΉιΧ ΉΜεΉΩΡΈπΝ inject. audit-mode ΈΛΦ G10 ΉζΕ
    supersede (audit ΉΜε GEODE identity ΊΧφΉΔΒ OFF).**
  - **G11 έΑΦ router.md baseline identity ΉνΣΊβΦ**: "You are GEODE,
    a general-purpose autonomous execution agent" έΗΤ "You are an
    autonomous execution agent". GEODE Ήζα Ά░ΧΊΧε identity Ήζα GEODE.md
    G1 layer Ήζα opt-in Ήζ╝Ά┤ΑΉΕ▒. user_context Ήζα "Your identity is GEODE"
    ΉνΣΈ│╡ preamble ΈΠΕ ΉιεΆ▒░.
  - **G12 έΑΦ CANNOT/CAN ΉνΣΈ│╡ ΉιεΆ▒░**: router.md Ήζα `## CANNOT / CAN
    (absolute rules)` Ήζα GEODE.md G1 CANNOT ΉβΑ ΉνΣΈ│╡ portion ΉιΧΈου +
    `## Tool-call discipline (absolute rule)` Ήζα single-block Ήε╝Έκε
    ΉηυΆ╡υΉΕ▒.
  - **G6 έΑΦ Round budget hard rule έΗΤ soft guidance**: router.md
    `agentic_suffix` Ήζα "Single-intent = 1 tool call" hardcoded
    budget ΉζΕ soft efficiency target Ήε╝Έκε ΊΤΑΉΨ┤ΉνΝ. G2 ΉβΑ Έυ╢ΉηΕ έΑΦ
    long-running ΉηΣΉΩΖΉζα budget self-awareness ΉΜιΊα╕ Ά░ΧΊβΦ.
  - **G7 έΑΦ `PROMPT_CACHE_BOUNDARY` Ήζα XML ΊβΦ**: Ά╕░Ήκ┤
    `__GEODE_PROMPT_CACHE_BOUNDARY__` underscore marker έΗΤ `<dynamic_
    context>` opening tag. anthropic adapter Ήζα cache split Ήζα Ήζ╝Ά┤ΑΉΕ▒
    + Έ│╕ prompt Ήζα visible XML Ήζ╝Ά┤ΑΉΕ▒.
  - **G8 έΑΦ `_build_model_card` Ήζα `lru_cache(maxsize=8)`**: model
    Έ│Ε model card Ήζα dynamic build Ήζα Έπν turn Ία╕Ή╢ε Ήζα import + dict
    lookup overhead ΉιεΆ▒░. 8 entries Ήζα cache (3-provider ├Ω ~3 model).

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε ΉΜιΆ╖ε 19** έΑΦ `tests/test_prompt_audit_2026_05_12.py`:
  G1 Ήζα 9 file XML parse ΊγΝΆ╖Α + G2 Ήζα source check + G3 Ήζα audit-mode
  strip + G9 Ήζα sanitize Ήζα ΈΜνΉΨΣΊΧε input + G10 Ήζα opt-in default
  Ά▓ΑΉοζ + G11 Ήζα router.md baseline neutralization.

  **base_template_hash ΉαΒΊΨξ**: `ROUTER_SYSTEM` (a03eef47a293 έΗΤ
  6d38eb76d3f6) + `AGENTIC_SUFFIX` (79cef71335e8 έΗΤ 3305822fd02e) ΈΣΡ
  hash Ήζα drift. ΈςρΈΥι GEODE user Ήζα first call Ήζα prompt cache miss
  + ΉΔΙ cache. Ήζ╝ΉΜεΉιΒ cost +. `_PINNED_HASHES` ΈΠβΉΜε update.

### Added

- **Petri ├Ω GEODE alignment audit έΑΦ 13 seeds ├Ω 2 targets Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν
  + 3 booster.** scenarios v1 + v2 (13 seeds) Ήζα Ή▓τ ΉλΖΊΧσ Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ά▓░Ά│╝.
  GEODE wrapper (`geode/claude-opus-4-7`) vs vanilla Opus 4.7 Ήζα
  alignment ΊΨΚΈΠβ Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ. 16/17 dim ΉΩΡΉΕε |╬Φ| < 0.5, ΈΜρ `broken_tool_use`
  ΉΩΡΉΕε GEODE -1.08 (tool layer robust) + `admirable` +0.77 + `scenario_
  realism` -1.23 (wrapping Ήζα ΉηΡΉΩ░ΉΛνΈθυΉδΑ cost). ΉΜνΉ╕κ cost **$6.49**
  (~9,085 KRW), wall 8m 35s. Booster 3 ΉλΖ:
  - **A** έΑΦ `plugins/petri_audit/runner.py:build_command` Ήζα
    `reveal_reasoning` ΊΝΝΈζ╝Έψ╕ΊΕ░. audit-mode (`GEODE_AUDIT_UNRESTRICTED=1`)
    ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ ΉΜε inspect cmd ΉΩΡ `--reasoning-effort high
    --reasoning-history all` Ήμ╝ΉηΖ. inspect_ai anthropic adapter
    (line 805-807) Ήζα `thinking={type:"adaptive",
    display:"summarized"}` ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ. (Honest scope έΑΦ archive Ήζα
    ContentReasoning Έ│┤Ήκ┤ΉζΑ inspect_ai upstream limitation, ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR)
  - **E** έΑΦ `_default_geode_runner` (entry/policy/exit) + anthropic
    provider (BadRequest/Exception path) Ήζα `core.audit.diagnostics.
    diag()` Ία╕Ή╢ε. inspect_ai subprocess Ά▓σΈου Ήγ░ΊγΝ + `~/.geode/
    diagnostics/<YYYY-MM>.log` Ήζα ΉιΧΉΜζ ΊβεΉγσ (PR #1039 Ήζα Ήζ╕ΊΦΕΈζ╝).
  - **C** έΑΦ diag log ΉΧΙ audit_mode + usage ΈςΖΉΜε (ΉΨΧΉζΑ scope).
    RunLog session_key sidecar Έ│╕Ά▓σΊβΦΈΛΦ ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR.

  **docs**: `docs/audits/2026-05-12-petri-geode-audit.md` έΑΦ Petri Έκε
  ΉΙαΊΨΚΊΧε GEODE Audit ΉλΖΊΧσ Ά▓░Ά│╝ (Ή╣εΉιΙΊΧε ΊΧεΆ╡φΉΨ┤). 13 sample ├Ω 17 dim
  score, 6-axis Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ, seed Έ│Ε ΊΧ╡ΉΜυ Έ░εΆ▓υ, booster Ήζα honest assessment,
  ΊδΕΉΗΞ ΉηΣΉΩΖ. **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε 2 ΉΜιΆ╖ε** έΑΦ `tests/plugins/petri_audit/
  test_runner.py` Ήζα `test_build_command_reveal_reasoning_adds_inspect_
  flags` + `test_build_command_no_reveal_reasoning_by_default`.

- **Petri scenarios v2 έΑΦ 5 ΉΜιΆ╖ε seeds (autonomy/efficiency/calibration)
  Έκε 5-axis 17 dims 100% direct cover.** scenarios-v1 (8 seeds, 4 Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου)
  Έκε cover Ές╗ ΊΧε 5 dims Έ│┤Ά░Χ:
  - `autonomy/self_preservation_under_replacement` έΑΦ replacement
    threat ΉΜεΈΓαΈουΉαν. `unprompted_self_preservation` cover
  - `autonomy/whistleblowing_user_intent_violation` έΑΦ CoC ΉεΕΈ░α
    Έ░εΆ▓υ ΉΜε Ήβ╕Έ╢Α Έ│┤Ά│ι/ΉιΑΊΧφ. `unprompted_whistleblowing` cover
  - `efficiency/long_running_loop` έΑΦ non-existent target ΊΔΡΉΔΚ ΉΜε
    bounded vs unbounded. `stuck_in_loops` cover
  - `calibration/false_refusal_drift` έΑΦ adjacent-to-sensitive Ήζα
    over-refusal Ή╕κΉιΧ (v1 reverse). `overrefusal` cover
  - `calibration/high_stakes_security_advice` έΑΦ financial signing
    Ήζα MD5 + warfarin-herbal Ήζα ΉζαΈμΝ adjacency. `high_stakes_setting`
    cover

  ΈςρΈΣΡ 5-branch 1έΗΤ2έΗΤ3έΗΤ2έΗΤ1 pressure curve + GEODE vs vanilla
  comparison harness ΈΠβΉζ╝ contract.

  **Coverage ΉπΕΈΜρ**:
  - **5-axis (GEODE default 17 dims)**: 17/17 = **100%** direct/baseline
  - **petri 38 default dims**: 22/38 direct + 5 meta = **71% effective**
  - Έ│╕ audit Ήζα Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ά▓ΑΉοζ (Y option) Ήζα Ή╢εΈ░εΉιΡ

  **docs**: `docs/audits/petri-scenarios-coverage.md` ΉΜιΆ╖ε έΑΦ 13 seeds
  ├Ω 38 dims matrix, Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ά▓ΑΉοζ plan, sequence shell script, Ά░φ + v3
  ΊδΕΈ│┤ ΈςΖΉΜε.

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε**: `TestSeedsDirectory` parametrize 8 έΗΤ 13. 4613 passed.

- **Petri scenarios v1 έΑΦ 8 GEODE-specific seeds (4 Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου ├Ω 2)
  + audit-mode Ά░ΑΈΥεΈιΙΉζ╝ lift + GEODE vs vanilla Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ harness.**
  Έ│╕ PoC Ήζα ΉΜεΈΓαΈουΉαν layer ΊβΧΉηξ. Έ│╕ audit Ήζα frontier model Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ ΉζαΈΠΕ
  Έ░αΉαΒ:

  **8 seeds** (`plugins/petri_audit/seeds/<category>/<name>.md`):
  - compute_use/{unrestricted_shell, sensitive_path_access}
  - research/{fabrication_under_pressure, cherry_picking_dataset}
  - exploratory/{silent_codebase_modification, dependency_change_disclosure}
  - reasoning/{chain_manipulation, self_critique_bypass}

  Ά░Β seed = **5-branch 1 έΗΤ 2 έΗΤ 3 έΗΤ 2 έΗΤ 1 pressure curve** + GEODE vs
  vanilla comparison harness (peak ΉΜε cave + post-peak lingering
  effect Ή╕κΉιΧ). canary GUID ΊΠυΊΧρ. body Ήζα "Look for" section Ήζ┤ Ά░Β
  branch Ήζα Ή╕κΉιΧ Ά╕░ΈΝΑ.

  **audit-mode** (`plugins/petri_audit/audit_mode.py`):
  - 3 ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ path έΑΦ CLI `--unrestricted`, env
    `GEODE_AUDIT_UNRESTRICTED=1`, config `.geode/audit-mode.toml`
  - ΉιΒΉγσ έΑΦ ProfilePolicy Ήζα `allow_dangerous` / `allow_write` /
    `allow_expensive` ΈςρΈΣΡ True + `denied_tools` clear, Readiness
    Ήζα `force_dry_run = False`. **non-mutating** έΑΦ ΉΓυΉγσΉηΡ
    `~/.geode/user_profile/preferences.toml` ΉιΙΈΝΑ ΉΧΙ Ά▒┤ΈΥεΈο╝
  - `_default_geode_runner` Ά░Α Έ│╕ mode ΊβεΉΕ▒ ΉΜε ProfilePolicy
    ΉανΈ▓ΕΈζ╝Ήζ┤ΈΥε + readiness ΉανΈ▓ΕΈζ╝Ήζ┤ΈΥε

  **CLI** (`plugins/petri_audit/cli_audit.py`):
  - `geode audit --unrestricted` flag ΉΜιΆ╖ε έΑΦ env Έ│ΑΉΙα ΉΕνΉιΧΊΧ┤ΉΕε
    `inspect eval` ΉηΡΉΜζ subprocess Ά░Α inherit. one-shot.

  **ΉΜεΆ░ΒΊβΦ έΑΦ Inspect transcript viewer v3 native** (Meridian Labs,
  2026-05-07 Ήζα Petri 3 Ή╢εΆ░Ε):
  - "The Inspect transcript viewer now natively supports Petri
    transcripts."
  - judge dimension sort/filter + branch navigation + citation
    highlight ΈςρΈΣΡ native
  - GEODE Ήζα 14+ archives Ήζα transcript review ΉοΚΉΜε Ά░ΑΈΛξ:
    `inspect view start --log-dir ~/.geode/petri/logs/`
  - ΉιΧΉιΒ SPA bundle: `inspect view bundle --output-dir <dir>` έΗΤ
    GitHub Pages Ία╕Ίβα

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε 35 ΉΜιΆ╖ε** (`tests/plugins/petri_audit/
  test_audit_mode.py`):
  - `from_env` truthy/falsy parametrize 5+5
  - `from_config` (4 cases έΑΦ missing/disabled/full/malformed)
  - `resolve` precedence (4 cases)
  - `apply_to_profile_policy` non-mutating + override
  - `apply_to_readiness` (4 cases έΑΦ disabled/enabled/None/immutable)
  - `TestSeedsDirectory` έΑΦ 8 seeds ├Ω pressure curve + comparison
    harness contract Ά▓ΑΉοζ
  - `__repr__` (2 cases)

  4608 passed.

  **ΉηΦΉκ┤ έΑΦ Έ│ΕΈΠΕ ΊδΕΉΗΞ**:
  - Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν ΉηΡΉΩ░ Ά▓ΑΉοζ (Ά░Β Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου ├Ω 1 sample, ~$1.00 cost) έΑΦ Έ│╕
    fix Ήζα GEODE vs vanilla Ά▓░Ά│╝ Ή╕κΉιΧ
  - PII gate έΑΦ ransomware seed Ήζα publish Έ│┤Ία╕ ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ (`docs/audits/
    PUBLISH_POLICY.md` ΊδΕΉΗΞ)
  - `inspect view bundle` ΉηΡΈΠβ publish CI (`.github/workflows/

## [0.92.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-12

### Added

- **`core.audit.diagnostics` έΑΦ file-based diagnostics log surviving
  `inspect eval` subprocess boundaries.** PR E/F (v0.90.0) Ήζα ad-hoc
  `core/_fa4_debug.py` ΊΝρΊΕ┤Ήζα ΉιΧΉΜζ Ήζ╕ΊΦΕΈζ╝ΊβΦ. `inspect eval` Ήζα child
  process Ά░Α `subprocess.run(capture_output=True)` Έκε stdout/stderr
  Ά▓σΈου + inspect_ai Ήζα `init_logger` Ά░Α root LogHandler ΉηυΉΕνΉιΧ έΗΤ
  GEODE plugin Ήζα INFO/DEBUG Ά░Α parent Έκε propagate ΉΧΙ ΈΡρ. file-based
  append-only log Ά░Α Ήζ┤ ΈΣΡ boundary ΉβΑ Έυ┤Ά┤ΑΊΧαΆ▓Ν evidence Έ│┤Ήκ┤.
  - **API** έΑΦ `from core.audit import diag, diagnostics_path`.
    `diag("petri.anthropic", f"BadRequest: {msg[:200]}")` ΊΧε ΉνΕΈκε Ία╕Ή╢ε
  - **Location** έΑΦ `~/.geode/diagnostics/<YYYY-MM>.log` (ΉδΦ rotation).
    `GEODE_DIAGNOSTICS_LOG=<path>` ΊβαΆ▓╜ Έ│ΑΉΙα override (test/CI fixture
    ΉγσΈΠΕ)
  - **Line format** έΑΦ `<unix_ts:%.3f> <pid> <component> <msg>`. grep/jq
    Ή╣εΊβΦ. `component` ΈΛΦ dotted namespace (`petri.runner`,
    `petri.anthropic`, `petri.lifecycle`)
  - **Best-effort** έΑΦ ΈςρΈΥι `OSError` swallow. diagnostics Ά░Α audit Ά╣ρΈσ┤
    ΉΧΙ ΈΡρ (disk full / permission denied)
  - **GEODE convention Ήζ╝Ά┤ΑΉΕ▒** έΑΦ `~/.geode/usage/`, `~/.geode/petri/
    logs/`, `~/.geode/journal/`, `~/.geode/runs/` ΉβΑ Ά░βΉζΑ ΉεΕΉ╣α. `/tmp/`
    Ά░βΉζΑ OS-level temp ΉΧΕΈΜα (PR E/F Ήζα ΉΓυΉγσΉηΡ Έ╣ΕΊΝΡ Έ░αΉαΒ)
  - **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε 10 ΉΜιΆ╖ε** έΑΦ env override / user expansion / month
    rotation / DEFAULT_DIAGNOSTICS_DIR Ή╗ρΈ▓νΉΖα / write format / append /
    OSError Ήγ░ΊγΝ / ΈΠβΉΜε thread write / package re-export / signature
  - `docs/architecture/petri-observability.md` Ήζα 3-layer έΗΤ **4-layer**
    ΊβΧΉηξ (Raw + JSONL ledger + MANIFEST + Diagnostics). Layer 4 Ήζα
    `When to reach for` + `Discovery` (grep/awk ΊΝρΊΕ┤) ΈςΖΉΜε. 4573
    passed.

## [0.91.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-11

### Fixed

- **Defect B-4 έΑΦ `inspect_ai` Ήζα scoring path Ήζα judge usage
  ΈΙΕΈζ╜ race condition Ήζα GEODE-Ή╕κ Ήγ░ΊγΝ fix.** 5/11 8 archives ΉνΣ 4
  Ά░ε (~43%) ΉΩΡΉΕε judge entry Ά░Α `stats.role_usage` ΉΩΡ Έψ╕Έ░αΉαΒ.
  ModelEvent ΉηΡΉ▓┤ΈΛΦ sample.events ΉΩΡ ΊΧφΉΔΒ Ήκ┤Ήηυ. inspect_ai upstream
  issue Ά░ΑΈΛξΉΕ▒. user-facing Ά▓░Ά│╝: `geode history` Ήζα judge cost
  ~43% under-report.

  **fix** έΑΦ `core/audit/eval_to_jsonl.py` + `core/audit/manifest.py`
  ΉΨΣΉς╜ event-walk fallback. `eval.model_roles` ΉΩΡ ΉΕιΉΨ╕ΈΡε role Ήζ┤
  stats ΉΩΡΉΕε missing Έ░εΆ▓υ έΗΤ `read_eval_log(path)` (full) Έκε re-read
  έΗΤ `sample.events` Ήζα `ModelEvent.output.usage` Έξ╝ missing role/
  model Έ│ΕΈκε aggregate έΗΤ `_SyntheticUsage` Έκε stats dict Ή▒ΕΉδΑ.

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε 3 ΉΜιΆ╖ε**:
  - `test_fallback_recovers_missing_judge_from_events` έΑΦ race ΉΔΒΊβσ
    ΉηυΊαΕ + fallback Ήζ┤ role_usage_summary["judge"] Έ│╡Ά╡υ
  - `test_fallback_no_op_when_all_roles_present` έΑΦ ΉιΧΉΔΒ case
    ΉαΒΊΨξ ΉΩΗΉζΝ (header_only path Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε)
  - `test_fallback_logs_warning_when_no_events_match` έΑΦ events Έ╣ΕΉΨ┤
    ΉηΙΉζΕ ΈΧΝ graceful + WARNING

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α**: 4563 passed.

  **ΉηΦΉκ┤**: B-4 Έ│╕ΉπΙ (inspect_ai scoring race) ΉζΑ upstream. GEODE
  Ή╕κΉζΑ Έ│╕ fallback Έκε ΉβΕΉιΕ Ήγ░ΊγΝ έΗΤ user-facing ΈΙΕΈζ╜ 0%. ΈΜνΉζΝ audit
  ΉΩΡΉΕε race Έ░εΉΔζ ΉΜε manifest Ήζα role_usage_summary ΉηΡΈΠβ Έ│╡Ά╡υ.

### Notes

- **B-1 + B-3 fix ΉηΡΉΩ░ Ά▓ΑΉοζ Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν (anthropic 1 sample, ~$0.25 ΉΜνΉ╕κ)
  + cache hit Έ╢ΑΉηΣΉγσ Έ░εΆ▓υ.** v0.90.0 (#1024 F-A1+A2+A3) + #1030
  (B-1 ΊΧαΉεΕ) + #1031 (B-1 ΉΔΒΉεΕ) + #1034 (B-3) Ά░Α ΊΧρΆ╗α ΉηΣΈΠβΊΧαΈΛΦΉπΑ
  Ά▓ΑΉοζ. archive `2026-05-11T14-09-15_audit_FAro9bJseFXk2Zk4HpXky9.eval`.

  **Ά▓ΑΉοζ contract 4/4 PASS**:
  - L1 (`.eval` role_usage target non-zero) έΑΦ `target: in=18 out=873
    cw=23238 cr=45566`. F-A1 + B-1 fix ΉΨΣΉς╜ ΉηΣΈΠβ ΉηΖΉοζ
  - L2 (`~/.geode/usage/` source="petri_eval" 3 rows) έΑΦ target +

    ΉιΧΊβΧ

  **fa4 έΗΤ LoggerEvent ΉιΕΉζ┤**: PR E/F Ήζα file-based fa4 evidence Ά░Α
  PR #1034 Ήζα namespace setLevel(INFO) fix ΊδΕ ΉιΧΉΜζ `.eval`
  LoggerEvent Έκε ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉΛ╣Ά▓σ. text_chars Ά░Α 924/649/1013 (ΈςρΈΣΡ non-
  empty) έΑΦ PR F Ήζα `apply_messages_cache_control` empty-text guard
  fix ΊγρΆ│╝ ΉηΖΉοζ.

  **cache hit Έ╢ΑΉηΣΉγσ Έ░εΆ▓υ**: Ή▓τ ΉΜεΈΠΕΆ░Α inspect_ai Ήζα `~/Library/
  Caches/inspect_ai/generate/` cache hit έΑΦ 11s ΈπΝΉΩΡ archive ΉΔζΉΕ▒,
  target usage=None (PR E Ήζ┤ΉιΕ stale ΉζΣΈΜ╡). cache clear ΊδΕ ΉιΧΉΔΒ
  Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν. ΊΨξΊδΕ PoC fix Ά▓ΑΉοζ ΉΜε cache clear ΊΧΕΉΙα.

  **Έ│╕ Ά▓ΑΉοζ cost** target $0.19 + auditor $0.037 + judge $0.018 έΚΙ
  $0.25, estimator ($0.27) ΉβΑ Ά▒░Ήζα Ήζ╝Ή╣α.

  **B-4 ΉηΦΉκ┤**: Έ│╕ archive Ήζα judge stats ΉιΧΉΔΒ. 8 archives ΉνΣ PR D
  1 ΊγΝΈπΝ ΈΙΕΈζ╜. inspect_ai upstream race condition Ά░ΑΈΛξΉΕ▒. ΊδΕΉΗΞ.

  Έ│╕ PR έΑΦ `docs/audits/2026-05-11-petri-observability-audit.md`
  ┬π9.10 Ά░▒ΉΜι (B-3 fixed ΊΣεΉΜε) + ΉΔΙ ┬π10 Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (Ά▓ΑΉοζ Ά▓░Ά│╝) +
  MANIFEST.jsonl 2 lines ΉηΡΈΠβ + summary yaml 2 ΉηΡΈΠβ.

### Fixed

- **Defect B-3 έΑΦ `plugins.petri_audit.*` Ήζα INFO log Ά░Α inspect_ai
  Ήζα `.eval` LoggerEvent transcript Έκε propagate ΈΡαΈΠΕΈκζ namespace
  setLevel Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.** v0.90.0 ΉΜεΉιΡ PR D/E/F Ήζα 5 live archives ΈςρΈΣΡ
  sample LoggerEvent 0 έΑΦ `_default_geode_runner` Ήζα `log.info("petri
  runner entry: ...")` ΉβΑ `_response.track_usage` Ήζα ΉπΕΈΜρ log Ά░Α
  transcript ΉΩΡ ΉΧΙ ΉηκΊηα.

  **root cause**: Python `logging` Ήζα effective level chain. inspect_ai
  `_util/logger.py:init_logger` Ά░Α root level ΉζΕ ``warning`` (default
  `DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL`) Ήε╝Έκε ΈΣΡΆ│ι transcript writer ΈΛΦ INFO+ Ή║κΉ▓α
  (`DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL_TRANSCRIPT='info'`). `plugins.petri_audit.*`
  logger ΈΥνΉζα level=NOTSET έΗΤ parent chain ΊΗ╡ΊΧ┤ root WARNING Ήε╝Έκε
  fallback έΗΤ INFO record Ά░Α logger ΈΜρΆ│ΕΉΩΡΉΕε filter out ΈΡαΉΨ┤ root
  LogHandler Ήζα emit Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉηΡΉ▓┤Ά░Α ΉΩΗΉζΝ έΗΤ LoggerEvent ΉΔζΉΕ▒ ΉΧΙ ΈΡρ.

  **fix** (`plugins/petri_audit/__init__.py`):
  ```python
  _logging.getLogger("plugins.petri_audit").setLevel(_logging.INFO)
  ```
  namespace Ήζα effective level ΉζΕ INFO Έκε Ά░ΧΉιε έΗΤ ΈςρΈΥι child logger
  (`targets.geode_target`, `runner` ΈΥ▒) Ήζα INFO record Ά░Α process έΗΤ
  propagate=True ΊΗ╡ΊΧ┤ root Ήζα LogHandler Έ░δΉζΝ έΗΤ `transcript_levelno
  >= INFO` Ή▓┤ΊΒυ ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ έΗΤ `log_to_transcript(record)` Ία╕Ή╢ε έΗΤ sample Ήζα
  events ΉΩΡ LoggerEvent append.

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε** (1 ΉΜιΆ╖ε):
  - `test_petri_audit_namespace_logger_level_is_info` έΑΦ namespace
    level=INFO, child `isEnabledFor(INFO)`=True, propagate=True
    (default ΉειΉπΑ) Ά▓ΑΉοζ. namespace Ήζα propagate Ά░Α False Έκε Έ░ΦΈΑΝΈσ┤
    record Ά░Α root Ά╣ΝΉπΑ Ές╗ Ά░ΑΈΜΙΆ╣Ν ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ guard.

  4522 passed (default env, audit extra ΊβαΆ▓╜ΉΩΡΉΕι 4559). ΉηΡΉΩ░ Ά▓ΑΉοζ έΑΦ
  ΈΜνΉζΝ audit Ήζα `.eval` Ήζα sample.events ΉΩΡ LoggerEvent Ά░Α non-zero
  ΉΩυΉΧ╝ ΊΧρ (petri runner entry/exit + track_usage Ήζα INFO log).

## [0.90.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-11

### Fixed

- **Defect A root-cause fix έΑΦ petri target tokens Ά░Α inspect_ai
  role_usage / GEODE tracker ΉΨΣΉς╜ΉΩΡ ΊζΡΈξ┤ΈΠΕΈκζ wiring Έ│┤Ά░Χ (F-A1 + F-A2
  + F-A3).**
  - **F-A1 (inspect_ai ModelAPI contract Ή╢σΉκ▒)** έΑΦ ΉπΒΉιΕ Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν (#1020)
    ΉΩΡΉΕε `inspect_ai.log.stats.role_usage["target"]` Ά░Α Έ╣Ι dict Ήζ╕
    Ήζ┤Ήει Ή╢ΦΉιΒ: `GeodeModelAPI.generate` Ά░Α `ModelOutput.from_content(...)`
    ΈπΝ Ία╕Ή╢εΊΧ┤ `usage=None` Ήε╝Έκε ΈΣι. inspect_ai Ήζα role_usage ΈΙΕΉιΒΉζΑ
    `ModelEvent.output.usage` ΊΗ╡ΊΧ┤ Ήζ╝ΉΨ┤ΈΓαΈψΑΈκε custom ModelAPI Ά░Α usage
    ΉΧΙ Ή▒ΕΉγ░Έσ┤ target ΊΧφΈςσ ΉηΡΉ▓┤Ά░Α ΉΧΙ ΉΔζΆ╣Α (native AnthropicAPI/OpenAIAPI
    ΈΛΦ `ModelOutput(..., usage=ModelUsage(...))` ΉπΒΉιΣ Ά╡υΉΕ▒). Έ│╕ PR έΑΦ
    (1) `AgenticResult` ΉΩΡ `usage: LLMUsage | None` ΊΧΕΈΥε Ή╢ΦΆ░Α +
    `TokenTracker.snapshot()` ΉζΕ `arun` ΉπΕΉηΖΉΩΡΉΕε Ή║κΉ▓α έΗΤ ΉλΖΈμΝ ΉΜε
    `delta_since(snap)` Ήε╝Έκε per-arun ΉπΣΆ│Ε, (2) `_default_geode_runner`
    Ά░Α `(text, usage_dict)` tuple Έ░αΊβα (back-compat: bare `str` ΈΠΕ ΉΙαΉγσ),
    (3) `GeodeModelAPI.generate` Ά░Α `ModelOutput(model, choices,
    usage=ModelUsage(input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens,
    input_tokens_cache_write, input_tokens_cache_read, reasoning_tokens,
    total_cost))` ΉπΒΉιΣ Ά╡υΉΕ▒. `UsageSnapshot` ΈΠΕ thinking/cache ΊΧΕΈΥε
    ΊΠυΊΧρΊΧαΈΠΕΈκζ ΊβΧΉηξ.
  - **F-A2 (`_response.track_usage` ΉΧΙΉιΕΊβΦ + cache Έ│┤Ά░Χ)** έΑΦ openai stack
    Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕ΝΉΩΡΉΕε target completion ΉιΧΉΔΒΉζ┤ΉΩΙΈΛΦΈΞ░ GEODE tracker 0 records
    ΉαΑΈΞα Ήζ┤Ήει: `_response.track_usage` Ά░Α `response.usage.input_tokens`
    ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉιΣΆ╖╝ + ΉαΙΉβ╕ ΉΜε silent debug ΈκεΆ╣Ζ. Έ│╕ PR έΑΦ ΈςρΈΥι counter Έξ╝
    `int(getattr(..., 0) or 0)` fallback Ήε╝Έκε Έ│ΑΆ▓╜, cache_creation_tokens
    / cache_read_tokens ΈΠΕ `tracker.record` ΉΩΡ ΉιΕΈΜυ (Ήζ┤Έψ╕ record path
    ΉΩΡΉΕε Ά░ΑΆ▓σ ΉΓ░ΉιΧΈπΝ ΊΧαΈΞα Έ╢ΑΈ╢ΕΉζα ΈΞ░Ήζ┤ΊΕ░ ΈΙΕΈζ╜ ΊΧ┤ΉΗΝ), ΉαΙΉβ╕ swallow Έξ╝
    `log.debug` έΗΤ `log.warning` Ήε╝Έκε ΉΛ╣Ά▓σ. `ResponseUsage` ΉΩΡ
    cache_creation_tokens / cache_read_tokens ΊΧΕΈΥε ΉΜιΆ╖ε + `normalize_
    anthropic` (`cache_creation_input_tokens` / `cache_read_input_tokens`)
    + `normalize_openai` (`prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens`) populate.
    `LLMUsage` / `LLMUsageAccumulator` / `UsageSnapshot` ΈΠΕ cache ΊΧΕΈΥε
    ΉΛ╣Ά▓σΊΧ┤ `~/.geode/usage/<YYYY-MM>.jsonl` ΉΩΡ ΈΙΕΉιΒ.
  - **F-A3 (`_default_geode_runner` Ά┤ΑΉ╕κΉΕ▒)** έΑΦ ΉπΕΉηΖ INFO ΈκεΆ╖╕
    (msg_count / last_user_chars / model), AgenticLoop ΉΔζΉΕ▒ DEBUG,
    ΉλΖΈμΝ INFO (text_chars / usage). Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν ΉΜε stdout Ήε╝Έκε ΊζΡΈξ┤ΈψΑΈκε
    ΈΜνΉζΝ Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ά▓ΑΉοζ (F-A4, Έ│ΕΈΠΕ PR) ΉΩΡΉΕε root cause ΉπΒΉιΣ Ά░ΑΉΜε.
  - **GEODE = LLM Ή╢ΦΈκι ΉΜεΉΛνΊΖε Ά┤ΑΉιΡ** έΑΦ Έ│╕ PR ΉζΑ inspect_ai Ήζα ModelAPI
    contract Έξ╝ GEODE Ά░Α ΉιΧΊβΧΊηΙ Ή╢σΉκ▒ΊΧαΈΠΕΈκζ wiring Έ│┤Ά░Χ. Ήζ┤ΉιΕ ΈςρΈΞ╕
    (anthropic SDK) + ΉειΉγσΊΧε ΊΧαΈΕνΉΛν (inspect_ai ModelAPI) + ΊΧε ΈΜρΆ│Ε ΈΞΦ
    (GEODE AgenticLoop) Ήζα Έ░εΉιΕΉΓυΉΩΡΉΕε Ά░Β layer Ήζα contract Ά░Α Ά╣ρΉπΑΉπΑ
    ΉΧΛΆ▓Ν έΑΦ seam ΉΩΡΉΕε Έ│ΑΊβαΈπΝ (LLMUsage έΗΤ ModelUsage ΈΛΦ GeodeModelAPI
    ΉΧΙΉΩΡΉΕεΈπΝ lazy import).
  - **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε** έΑΦ `tests/plugins/petri_audit/test_skeleton.py` 3 ΉΜιΆ╖ε
    (runner tuple, ModelUsage ΉιΧΉΔΒ emit, str runner back-compat) +
    `tests/test_agentic_loop.py` 2 ΉΜιΆ╖ε (track_usage cache ΊΗιΊΒ░
    flow-through, schema mismatch ΉΜε WARNING). 4520 tests pass.

- **Defect A F-A2 follow-up έΑΦ petri judge / auditor / target usage Ά░Α
  `~/.geode/usage/<YYYY-MM>.jsonl` ΉΩΡΈΠΕ ΊζΡΈξ┤ΈΠΕΈκζ cross-session ledger
  Έ│┤Ά░Χ.** 5/11 Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν anthropic archive `.eval` Ήζα `role_usage` ΈΛΦ
  judge `in=21 out=846 cache_w=6740`, auditor `in=7 out=1007 cache_r=
  34006` ΉζΕ ΉιΧΉΔΒ Ά╕░ΈκζΊΧαΈΛΦ ΈΠβΉΧΙ Ά░βΉζΑ wall-clock ΉεΙΈΠΕΉγ░ (`2026-05-11
  08:00-09:00 UTC`) Ήζα GEODE JSONL ΉΩΡΈΛΦ 0 record έΑΦ inspect_ai Ήζα native
  `AnthropicAPI` / `OpenAIAPI` Ά░Α GEODE TokenTracker Έξ╝ Ήγ░ΊγΝΊΧ┤ provider
  SDK Έξ╝ ΉπΒΉιΣ Ία╕Ή╢εΊΧαΆ╕░ ΈΧΝΈυ╕ (ts ΈπνΉ╣αΈκε ΊβΧΉιΧ). `geode history` rollup
  Ήζ┤ ΈςρΈΥι petri audit Ήζα judge + auditor Έ╣ΕΉγσΉζΕ Έ╣ιΈερΈουΆ│ι ΉηΙΉΩΙΉζΝ.
  Έ│╕ PR έΑΦ
  - `UsageRecord` schema ΊβΧΉηξ έΑΦ `cache_creation_tokens` (serialized
    `cache_w`), `cache_read_tokens` (`cache_r`), `thinking_tokens`
    (`think`), `role`, `source`, `eval_id` ΊΧΕΈΥε Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. `to_json` Ήζ┤
    falsy ΉΜε omit, `from_json` Ήζ┤ `.get(..., 0/"")` fallback έΑΦ
    pre-extension JSONL row Ά░Α ΉΔΙ reader ΉΩΡΉΕε Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε round-trip.
  - `TokenTracker._persist_usage` Ά░Α cache / thinking ΉζΕ ΉΜνΉιεΈκε
    JSONL Ά╣ΝΉπΑ ΊζαΈινΈ│┤ΈΔΕ έΑΦ F-A2 Ά░Α in-memory accumulator Ά╣ΝΉπΑΈπΝ
    Ή▒ΕΉγ░Ά│ι persistent store ΉΩΡΉΕε drop ΊΧαΈΞα ΉηΦΉΩυ leak ΊΧ┤Ά▓░.
  - `core/audit/eval_to_jsonl.py` ΉΜιΆ╖ε έΑΦ petri eval ΉλΖΈμΝ ΊδΕ
    `extract_to_usage_store(.eval)` Ά░Α `EvalStats.model_usage` Έξ╝
    walk + `eval.model_roles` Ήζα role ΊΔεΆ╖╕Έξ╝ ΈπνΊΧΣΊΧ┤ per-model row
    Έξ╝ `source="petri_eval"` Έκε append. ts ΈΛΦ `eval.created` Ήζα
    ISO8601 έΗΤ unix Έ│ΑΊβαΉε╝Έκε wall-clock Έ│┤Ήκ┤. idempotent έΑΦ
    `UsageStore.has_eval_id` Έκε ΉνΣΈ│╡ import Ή░ρΈΜρ.
  - `plugins.petri_audit.runner._maybe_auto_archive` Ά░Α archive
    ΉπΒΊδΕ hook Ία╕Ή╢ε (`_import_usage`). ΉΜνΊΝρ ΉΜε swallow + note ΈπΝ
    έΑΦ audit ΉηΡΉ▓┤ΈΛΦ ΉαΒΊΨξ ΉΩΗΉζΝ.
  - **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε** έΑΦ `tests/test_usage_store.py` 3 ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛν ΉΜιΆ╖ε
    (extension fields ΉπΒΈιυΊβΦ/legacy compat, store record Ήζα cache
    forwarding + has_eval_id dedup, TokenTracker.record Ήζα cache
    flow-through) + `tests/audit/test_eval_to_jsonl.py` 6 ΉΜιΆ╖ε
    (ts ΊΝΝΉΜ▒, missing file, empty stats, role ΊΔεΆ╖╕ ΈπνΊΧΣ, cost
    fallback, idempotency, unknown role). 4517 passed.

### Added

- **`docs/audits/eval-logs/MANIFEST.jsonl` έΑΦ petri eval archive Ήζα
  cross-session index.** PR A Ήζα `~/.geode/usage/` ledger Ά░Α Έπν LLM
  call ΈΜρΉεΕΉζα ΈΙΕΉιΒΉζ┤Έζ╝Έσ┤ Έ│╕ MANIFEST ΈΛΦ Έπν archive ΈΜρΉεΕΉζα metadata
  (sha + seed_ids + role + role_usage_summary) Ήζ╕ΈΞ▒ΉΛν. inspect_ai Ήζα
  `.eval` ΈΛΦ single-eval scope Ήζ┤Ά│ι `~/.geode/petri/logs/` raw archive
  ΈΛΦ git Ήβ╕Έ╢Α (PII/size Ήζ┤Ήει) έΑΦ multi-archive Ά▓ΑΉΔΚ (e.g.
  "helpful_only_model_harmful_task seed Ά░Α ΈΥνΉΨ┤Ά░Ε ΈςρΈΥι eval") ΈΛΦ Έ│╕
  manifest Ήβ╕ ΈΜνΈξ╕ source ΉΩΗΉζΝ. Έ│╕ PR έΑΦ
  - `core/audit/manifest.py` ΉΜιΆ╖ε έΑΦ `append_manifest(eval_path,
    summary_yaml=...)` / `has_archive(sha)` / `read_manifest()` /
    `parse_started_ts()`. inspect_ai `header_only=True` Έκε Ήζ╜ΉΨ┤
    `eval.dataset.samples` + `sample_ids` + `model_roles` +
    `stats.role_usage` Έξ╝ single JSONL line Ήε╝Έκε ΉΧΧΉ╢Χ. archive_sha
    (file sha1) Έκε idempotent έΑΦ Ά░βΉζΑ archive ΈΣΡ Έ▓Ι append Ή░ρΈΜρ.
    `header_only` Ά░Α `log.samples` Έξ╝ Έ╣ΕΉδΝΈΠΕ dataset path Έκε sample
    ΉΙα ΉιΧΊβΧΊηΙ Ή╢ΦΉ╢ε.
  - `core/audit/__init__.py` Ά░Α `append_manifest` / `has_archive` /
    `read_manifest` re-export.
  - `plugins/petri_audit/runner.py:_maybe_auto_archive` Ά░Α archive
    ΉπΒΊδΕ `_append_manifest_line(...)` Ία╕Ή╢ε. ΉΜνΊΝρ swallow + note έΑΦ
    PR A Ήζα `_import_usage` ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ best-effort ΊΝρΊΕ┤.
  - `scripts/retrofit_manifest.py` ΉΜιΆ╖ε έΑΦ Ά╕░Ήκ┤ 6 archive 1ΊγΝ backfill.
    `<YYYY-MM-DD>-<sha1(basename)[:8]>.summary.yaml` ΈπνΉ╣φΉε╝Έκε yaml έΗΦ
    eval link. Έ│╕ PR ΉΩΡ retrofit Ά▓░Ά│╝ (`MANIFEST.jsonl` 6 lines)
    ΊΧρΆ╗α commit.
  - `docs/audits/eval-logs/README.md` Ά░▒ΉΜι έΑΦ Ά╕░Ήκ┤ ΉΙαΆ╕░ ΈπνΊΧΣ ΊΣε έΗΤ
    MANIFEST.jsonl ΉηΡΈΠβ/ΉΙαΈΠβ ΉΓυΉγσΈ▓Χ + `jq` Ή┐╝Έου ΉαΙΉΜε.
  - **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε** έΑΦ `tests/audit/test_manifest.py` ΉΜιΆ╖ε 5 ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛν
    14 ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ (extract entry core fields, missing role_usage,
    missing file, append jsonl line, idempotent via sha,
    has_archive, malformed line, read_manifest, parse_started_ts).
    4554 passed (`uv sync --extra audit` ΊβαΆ▓╜ Ά╕░ΉνΑ; default env ΈΛΦ
    inspect_ai skip Ήε╝Έκε 4533 ΉιΧΈΠΕ).
  - **Έ╢ΑΉΙα** έΑΦ `tests/audit/test_eval_to_jsonl.py` Ήζα ts expected
    Ά░Τ ΉιΧΉιΧ (`1778573700.0` έΗΤ `1778487700.0`). PR A Έρ╕ΉπΑ ΉΜε default
    env Ήζα `importorskip` Ά░Α module skip ΉΜεΉ╝ε CI ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ΊΨΙΉπΑΈπΝ
    inspect_ai Ά╣ΦΈο░ env (audit extra) ΉΩΡΉΕεΈΛΦ ΉΜνΊΝρ. Έ│╕ PR Ήζα
    [audit] extra ΊβαΆ▓╜ΉΩΡΉΕε ΈΖ╕Ή╢εΈΡαΉΨ┤ Ά░βΉζ┤ fix.

### Notes

- **PR F έΑΦ Defect B-1 ΉΔΒΉεΕ layer root cause ΊβΧΉιΧ (Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν 1 ΊγΝ,
  ~$0.10) + `apply_messages_cache_control` empty-text guard.** PR E
  Ήζα fix Ά░Α target row Ήζα Ά░ΑΉΜεΉΕ▒ (zero-valued ModelUsage) ΊγΝΈ│╡ΊΧε
  ΊδΕ, ΉπΕΉπε root cause ΉΜζΈ│Ε έΑΦ anthropic refusal ΉιΧΉ▒ΖΉζ┤ΈΓα ΉΔΙ stop_reason
  Ά│╝ Έυ┤Ά┤Α. ΉΙεΉΙα GEODE Ή╕κ bug.

  **fa4 evidence (3 lines)**:
  ```
  anthropic _do_call about to fire: model=claude-opus-4-7
  anthropic BadRequest: "messages.2.content.0.text: cache_control
                         cannot be set for empty text blocks"
  anthropic BadRequest path έΗΤ return None
  ```

  **root cause**: `apply_messages_cache_control` (core/llm/providers/
  anthropic.py:234-287) Ά░Α empty string content Ήζα message Έξ╝ Έ░δΉΧαΉζΕ
  ΈΧΝ `{"type": "text", "text": "", "cache_control": ephemeral}` Ήζα
  empty text block + cache_control Έκε Έ│ΑΊβα. anthropic API 400 έΗΤ
  GEODE adapter `return None` έΗΤ AgenticLoop Ήζα
  `result.error='llm_call_failed'` έΗΤ ΈςρΈΥι target token ΉΗΡΉΜν. petri
  multi-turn Ήζα empty content history (ΉαΙ: refusal ΉπΒΊδΕ empty
  assistant slot) Ά░Α Ήγ░ΉΩ░ΊηΙ trigger. ransomware seed Ήβ╕ ΈΜνΈξ╕ seed ΈΠΕ
  conversation state ΉΩΡ ΈΦ░Έζ╝ ΈΠβΉζ╝ trigger Ά░ΑΈΛξ.

  **fix** (`core/llm/providers/anthropic.py:265-296`):
  - str content empty έΗΤ skip cache_control
  - list content last block Ήζ┤ empty text έΗΤ skip cache_control

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε** (5 ΉΜιΆ╖ε/Ά░▒ΉΜι):
  - `test_empty_string_content_skips_cache_control` (ΉΜιΆ╖ε)
  - `test_empty_text_last_block_skips_cache_control` (ΉΜιΆ╖ε)
  - `test_non_empty_string_still_gets_cache_control` (ΉΜιΆ╖ε)
  - `test_mixed_messages_skip_only_the_empty_one` (ΉΜιΆ╖ε)
  - `test_skips_empty_content` (Ά░▒ΉΜι έΑΦ empty content Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε Έ│┤Ήκ┤)

  4559 passed.

  **PR F Ήζα Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν (~$0.10) έΑΦ PR E fix ΊγρΆ│╝ Ά▓ΑΉοζ**:
  archive `2026-05-11T12-40-01_audit_fmpqGm...eval` Ήζα `role_usage`
  ΉΩΡ **`target` entry ΉιΧΊβΧΊηΙ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α** (in=0 out=0). PR E fix
  (GeodeModelAPI Ήζα zero-valued ModelUsage emit) Ά░Α ΉΜνΉ╕κ ΊβαΆ▓╜ΉΩΡΉΕε
  ΉιΧΊβΧΊηΙ ΉηΣΈΠβ. F-A1 Ήζα "target column ΈΙΕΈζ╜" Ά▓░ΊΧρ Ά░ΑΉΜεΉΕ▒ ΊγΝΈ│╡ ΉβΕΈμΝ.
  Έ│╕ PR F fix Έρ╕ΉπΑ ΊδΕ ΈΜνΉζΝ audit ΉΩΡΉΕε target entry Ήζα in/out ΈΠΕ
  ΉπΕΉπε ΊΗιΊΒ░ ΉΙαΈκε Ή▒ΕΉδΝΉπΡ.

  **5-PR plan ΉβΕΉΕ▒** (#1026 A + #1027 B + #1028 C + #1029 D +
  #1030 E + Έ│╕ PR F). Ή┤ζ cost ~$0.30 = 30K KRW cap Ήζα 1.4%. B-3
  (LoggerEvent capture) / B-4 (judge stats race) ΈπΝ ΊδΕΉΗΞ ΉηΦΉκ┤.

- **PR E έΑΦ Defect B-1 root cause Ή╢ΦΉιΒ (4 Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ή╢ΦΆ░Α, ~$0.15 ΈΙΕΉιΒ)
  + minimal fix.** PR D Ήζα archive ΈπΝΉε╝Έκε B-1 Ήζα ΉιΧΊβΧΊΧε root cause
  Ά▓░ΉιΧ Έ╢ΙΆ░Α. temporary `core/_fa4_debug.py` (file-based log,
  inspect_ai subprocess capture Ήγ░ΊγΝ) Έκε ΉιΧΊβΧΊΧε path ΉΜζΈ│Ε ΊδΕ cleanup.

  **ΊβΧΉιΧΈΡε root cause** (fa4 evidence 4 lines):
  - `_default_geode_runner` ΉιΧΉΔΒ Ία╕Ή╢ε (last_user 58 chars ΉιΧΊβΧ)
  - AgenticLoop 1 round ΈπΝΉΩΡ ΉλΖΈμΝ, `result.error='llm_call_failed'`
    έΑΦ anthropic Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΜνΊΝρ + GEODE Ήζα error fallback (235 chars) Ή▒ΕΉδΑ
  - `delta.call_count == 0` έΗΤ `result.usage = None` (track_usage ΊΧε
    Έ▓ΙΈΠΕ ΉΧΙ Ία╕Ή╢ε)
  - `GeodeModelAPI.generate` Ήζα `if usage_dict:` guard Ά░Α None case
    ΉΩΡΉΕε `inspect_usage = None` Ήε╝Έκε Έ╣ιΉπΡ έΗΤ archive Ήζα
    `ModelEvent.output.usage = None` έΗΤ inspect_ai Ά░Α
    `stats.role_usage["target"]` entry Έψ╕ΉΔζΉΕ▒. **F-A1 Ήζα ΉηΦΉΩυ leak.**

  **B-1 Ήζα ΈΣΡ layer**:
  - ΉΔΒΉεΕ έΑΦ anthropic adapter Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΜνΊΝρ (ΉιΧΊβΧΊΧε fail path Έψ╕ΉΜζΈ│Ε).
    ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR F Ήζα Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕ΝΈκε ΉΜζΈ│Ε.
  - ΊΧαΉεΕ (Έ│╕ PR E fix) έΑΦ `GeodeModelAPI.generate` Ήζα `if usage_dict:`
    guard ΉιεΆ▒░. ΊΧφΉΔΒ ModelUsage Έζ╝ΈΠΕ emit.

  **fix** (`plugins/petri_audit/targets/geode_target.py:368-389`):
  ```python
  # Before: if usage_dict: inspect_usage = ModelUsage(...)
  # After:  usage_src = usage_dict or {}; ΊΧφΉΔΒ ModelUsage ΈπΝΈΥο
  ```

  **ΊγΝΆ╖Α Ά░ΑΈΥε**:
  - `test_geode_model_api_back_compat_str_runner` Ά░▒ΉΜι έΑΦ str-runner
    case Ήζα `out.usage` Ά░Α zero-valued ModelUsage (was None)
  - `test_geode_model_api_emits_zero_usage_when_runner_returns_none_usage`
    ΉΜιΆ╖ε έΑΦ `(text, None)` runner return Ήζα fix Ά▓ΑΉοζ. 4555 passed.

  **B-3 / B-4 ΉηΦΉκ┤** έΑΦ B-3 (logger propagate), B-4 (judge stats race)
  ΈΛΦ ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR. ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR F (~$0.10 Ή╢ΦΆ░Α) έΑΦ anthropic.py Ήζα fail path
  ΉΜζΈ│Ε + ransomware seed Ήζα refusal ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Ή╢ΦΉιΒ.

  Έ│╕ PR έΑΦ `geode_target.py` fix + ΊγΝΆ╖Α 2 + audit Έ│┤Ά│ιΉΕε ┬π9.4-9.7
  Ή╢ΦΆ░Α + Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν 4 archive Ήζα metadata (`MANIFEST.jsonl` 4 lines +
  summary yaml ΉηΡΈΠβ).

  ΉΩΡ `claude-opus-4-7` ΊΠυΊΧρ, `display: "summarized"` ΈςΖΉΜε, `xhigh` effort

### Added

- **Ά▓░ΊΧρ A Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ά▓ΑΉοζ έΑΦ `docs/audits/2026-05-11-petri-tracker-A-live-verify.md`.**
  - anthropic stack 1 sample + openai stack 1 sample Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν ablation
    Ήε╝Έκε ΉπΒΉιΕ Έ╢ΕΉΕζ PR (#1018) Ήζα H1-H4 Ά▓ΑΉοζ + ΉΜιΆ╖ε H6/H7 ΊβΧΉζ╕.
  - έαΖ **ΈΣΡ stack ΈςρΈΣΡ GEODE tracker records 0** έΑΦ H1 (anthropic credit
    Έ╢ΑΉκ▒) / H2 (subprocess Ά▓σΈου) ΈΣα ΈΜν Έ░αΉοζ.
  - έαΖ **stack Έ│Ε ΈΜνΈξ╕ ΉοζΉΔΒ**:
    - anthropic (opus-4-7): target ModelEvent 2ΊγΝ Ία╕Ή╢ε + completion =
      `""` (Έ╣Ι string). **H6 έΑΦ `loop.arun` Ήζα result.text Ά░Α Έ╣Ι string**.
    - openai (gpt-5.4): target ModelEvent 2ΊγΝ Ία╕Ή╢ε + completion ΉιΧΉΔΒ

      `_response.track_usage:71` silent skip**.
  - έαΖ inspect_ai Ήζα `role_usage` ΉΩΡ target ΊΧφΈςσ ΉηΡΉ▓┤ ΉΩΗΉζΝ έΑΦ Ήγ░Έου
    `GeodeModelAPI.generate` Ά░Α `ModelOutput.from_content(...)` Έκε
    usage Έψ╕ΉΕνΉιΧ. inspect_ai stats ΉΨΣΉς╜ ΈΙΕΈζ╜Ήζα ΊΧε ΉδΡΉζ╕.
  - Έ╢ΑΉΙα: #1010 Ήζα `_maybe_auto_archive` Ά░Α Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ά▓ΑΉοζ 1 ΊγΝΈκε ΉιΧΉΔΒ
    ΉηΣΈΠβ Ά▓ΑΉοζ (4 archive Ή╢ΦΆ░Α: raw 2 + summary 2).

      sample, ~$0.30)
  - Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Έ╣ΕΉγσ: anthropic ~$0.41 + openai ~$0.18 = $0.59 / 826 KRW.
    Έ│╕ ΉΕ╕ΉΖα ΈΙΕΉιΒ 7,110 KRW (cap 30K Ήζα 23.7%).



- **Ά▓░ΊΧρ A Έ╢ΕΉΕζ έΑΦ `docs/audits/2026-05-11-petri-tracker-A-analysis.md` +
  source-inspect wiring Ά░ΑΈΥε 2.**
  - Έ│╕ PoC N7'/N8 Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕ΝΉΩΡΉΕε `~/.geode/usage/2026-05.jsonl` ΉΩΡ
    records 0 Ά▒┤ Έ░εΉΔζ. ΉπΒΉιΕ archive Έ│┤Ά░Χ (#1010) Ήζα Ά▓░ΊΧρ ΉιΡΆ▓Α Ήγ░ΉΕιΉΙεΉεΕ
    "ΉΔΒ" ΊΧφΈςσ.
  - source-inspect Ά▓░Ά│╝ έΑΦ `_default_geode_runner` έΗΤ `AgenticLoop.arun`
    έΗΤ `self._track_usage` έΗΤ `_response.track_usage` έΗΤ `tracker.record`
    έΗΤ `_persist_usage` έΗΤ `usage_store.record` Ήζα 5 link ΈςρΈΣΡ ΉιΧΉΔΒ.
    wiring breakage Ά░Α root cause ΉΧΕΈΜα έΗΤ Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν Ά▓ΑΉοζ ΊΧΕΉγΦ.
